subject: Major Deadline Approaching!

This November, liberals will fight with everything they have to take the Senate from us. Mega-donors from Silicon Valley Peter, This November, liberals will fight with _everything_ they have to take the Senate from us. **Mega-donors from Silicon Valley and New York are giving millions of dollars to far-left candidates running against Republican Senators this fall.** In turn, these “progressive“ candidates will represent the interest of Big Tech and Hollywood. _**We _must_ hold the Senate**_ so it continues to work for everyday Americans like us. **My team has a fundraising goal of $11,000** , which we must hit **before the end of August** — all money raised from grassroots supporters like **YOU**. Will you pledge your support today to help keep the Senate **RED**? [**DONATE HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=86072e8fbcea412f84ac7c27af6a3a23&_e=p332YpixjFZ7Sy6J3wjp3lHV-X44IAxN3lZFFp9JO3XhMh-jQlI-RMaqukltcWZtRga4Z8pD-xTJvG2GsWwDBe358qJ3-oq2Z9fwwI7OQ6wE7Ur4QXij2wFM1VouvH3QxyJznrWb0dIzbfR16zZvmVOJ9za6L0NOoUkXVK32gh-cGZDxuXI8OmUqZKSoqGtsmQUYHfOOgJp_p8rHw-vZ6xq3_UGclb-mvuJhH0qGC0B4TPTzMAIecdVtk79cEbvvaAz_uwBkqZAKtUUBTfZVQIXPBw8Cnx1gmv51Z9YfBzTkWeaO7Cq92POmu-vu_wAXaNlQQjRT2UxslFsxuyUvjUz8VC58zFmTd_SlW3VliqysIgRnW-6ydo7YW1ErgauNRuKX_33eXBe5BlK0epP_8RnCVCLXv2F63uWI6BmYixY%3D) As your senator, I promise to continue **standing up to socialists** , **defending our country** against foreign enemies, and **fighting for the right to life**. body:

Peter --

Last Tuesday, it was my honor to speak at the Democratic National Convention from Brandywine High School, where I made my case for Joe. I shared the story of our family, and how Joe helped us heal after tragedy. It's the same way he will bring this nation together: with love and understanding, with small acts of kindness, with bravery, and with unwavering faith.

**Today I have to ask, because we don 't have a moment to spare:**

[**Will you make your first donation to power this campaign today? Four days after our son Beau's funeral, I watched Joe shave and put on his suit. I saw him steel himself in the mirror. He took a breath, put his shoulders back, and walked out into a world empty of our son. He went to work. That's just who he is. He never stops fighting for the country he loves.

There are times when I couldn't imagine how he did it -- how he put one foot in front of the other and kept going. Still, I've always understood why he did it. He does it for you Peter.

Across the country, educators, parents, first responders, and Americans of all walks of life are putting their shoulders back and fighting for each other. We haven't given up.

**From now until November 3rd, I 'm doing everything I can to make sure we elect Joe and Kamala, and I'm asking if you can do the same. If you have the ability to contribute, we need you more than ever. Even a few dollars will go a long way to help them win in November.**

[**So, Peter, if you can, will you make your first donation to power this battle for the soul of the nation?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B4_DrB_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.25_B4_DrB_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thank you,

Jill

clean_body: It was my honor to speak at the Democratic National Convention from Brandywine High School. | | "" Peter -- Last Tuesday, it was my honor to speak at the Democratic National Convention from Brandywine High School, where I made my case for Joe. I shared the story of our family, and how Joe helped us heal after tragedy. It's the same way he will bring this nation together: with love and understanding, with small acts of kindness, with bravery, and with unwavering faith. Today I have to ask, because we don 't have a moment to spare: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Four days after our son Beau's funeral, I watched Joe shave and put on his suit. I saw him steel himself in the mirror. He took a breath, put his shoulders back, and walked out into a world empty of our son. He went to work. That's just who he is. He never stops fighting for the country he loves. There are times when I couldn't imagine how he did it -- how he put one foot in front of the other and kept going. Still, I've always understood why he did it. He does it for you Peter. Across the country, educators, parents, first responders, and Americans of all walks of life are putting their shoulders back and fighting for each other. We haven't given up. From now until November 3rd, I 'm doing everything I can to make sure we elect Joe and Kamala, and I'm asking if you can do the same. If you have the ability to contribute, we need you more than ever. Even a few dollars will go a long way to help them win in November. name: Team Hagerty
subject: Nominating President Trump For Re-Election, Joining Lou Dobbs
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-purydll-fuutjhhtj-ji/) August 25, 2020 **Nominating President Trump For Re-Election** Tennesseans are ready to re-elect President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence for another four years of their America First agenda. As Bill said, "We need to re-elect President Trump and Vice President Pence so we can continue to protect our conservative values and our most precious freedoms as well as to ensure the American dream for generations to come."You can read Bill's full statement [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Bill Hagerty Joins Lou Dobbs On Fox Business** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-y/) Last week, Bill Hagerty joined Lou Dobbs on Fox Business to discuss President Trump putting America first and fighting back against the Democrats' socialist agenda. Watch Bill Hagerty on Fox Business' Lou Dobbs Tonight [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. **Team Hagerty Promotes Goh, Matas, Newhouse** This week, Team Hagerty announced that Hunter Goh will be stepping up to the role of Political Director, Kendal Matas will be stepping up to the role of Grassroots Director and Savannah Newhouse will be stepping up to Press Secretary.You can read more about this announcement in the press release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-t/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Fox Business:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-k/) WATCH: Tennessee Senate candidate Bill Hagerty discusses primary victory, Democrats' radical agenda****[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-u/) Bill Hagerty: Make 'Made in the USA' the Theme of America Again

[WVLT:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-o/) Catching Up With the Candidates: Bill Hagerty****[Knox News Sentinel:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-m/) Schools -- especially colleges -- should play football this fall | Opinion**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-v/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-yu/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jt/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jd/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-purydll-fuutjhhtj-jh/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-purydll-l-jk)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-purydll-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tl) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-purydll-fuutjhhtj-tr/)

name: John Zody
subject: the 5 things we need to do to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, The last four years under Trump, Holcomb, and the Statehouse’s GOP supermajority have been detrimental to our livelihood and our democracy. Michelle Obama was right. We’ve got to vote in numbers that can’t be ignored. [**Become a founding member of the 2020 Safe Voting Initiative.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18848693/241865781/1114646829?refcode=Full.Launch.8.26.20.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzJmM2VjYy04MmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_4DNl4j2Oxk1bTYsx1UqVJDCDogIu59wZmdlD85KBo=) But in 2020, it's not enough for us to run a record-breaking get-out-the-vote campaign, we’ve got to make sure Hoosiers can vote safely. That’s why I’m launching the [**2020 Safe Voting Initiative**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18848694/241865782/1114646829?refcode=Full.Launch.8.26.20.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzJmM2VjYy04MmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_4DNl4j2Oxk1bTYsx1UqVJDCDogIu59wZmdlD85KBo=). Here’s the plan:
1. **Run a comprehensive voter protection project** designed to educate Democrats on their options to vote safely and what to do in instances of possible voter suppression. Maintain a voter protection hotline to help voters in need.
2. **Organize the largest vote-by-mail campaign in the history of our Party.** Create educational tools to help Hoosiers with the process. Reach out to eligible voters. Send thousands of vote-by-mail applications.
3. **Train candidates in safe GOTV practices.** Double the size of our staff to help build winning campaigns.
4. **Register a record number of young Democrats.** Partner with the College Dems. Provide them with protective equipment. Fund a texting program to get their registrants to the polls.
5. **Launch a texting and phone banking program** to make sure Hoosiers know when and where they can vote early.

This is a $50,000 initiative. But that pales in comparison to the cost of another four years under GOP leadership. The next five days are critical to getting started. So, we’ve set a goal to raise $12,000 by August 31st. [**Will you become a founding member of the 2020 Safe Voting Initiative?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18848695/241865783/1114646829?refcode=Full.Launch.8.26.20.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzJmM2VjYy04MmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_4DNl4j2Oxk1bTYsx1UqVJDCDogIu59wZmdlD85KBo=) -John Zody _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [**Chip in $5 for safe clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter, The last four years under Trump, Holcomb, and the Statehouse’s GOP supermajority have been detrimental to our livelihood and our democracy. Michelle Obama was right. We’ve got to vote in numbers that can’t be ignored. = But in 2020, it's not enough for us to run a record-breaking get-out-the-vote campaign, we’ve got to make sure Hoosiers can vote safely. That’s why I’m launching the =. Here’s the plan: 1. Run a comprehensive voter protection project designed to educate Democrats on their options to vote safely and what to do in instances of possible voter suppression. Maintain a voter protection hotline to help voters in need. 2. Organize the largest vote-by-mail campaign in the history of our Party. Create educational tools to help Hoosiers with the process. Reach out to eligible voters. Send thousands of vote-by-mail applications. 3. Train candidates in safe GOTV practices. Double the size of our staff to help build winning campaigns. 4. Register a record number of young Democrats. Partner with the College Dems. Provide them with protective equipment. Fund a texting program to get their registrants to the polls. 5. Launch a texting and phone banking program to make sure Hoosiers know when and where they can vote early. This is a $50,000 initiative. But that pales in comparison to the cost of another four years under GOP leadership. The next five days are critical to getting started. So, we’ve set a goal to raise $12,000 by August 31st. = -John Zody If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

Friend,
Four years ago, Donald became the 2016 Republican Nominee for President of the United States.

Since then, he has worked tirelessly every single day to Make America Great Again. He has proven time and time again that he will do whatever it takes to keep his promise to put America First.

Unfortunately, the Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they can to discredit Donald. From false accusations to spreading their fake news, they want it to appear that he does not have the support of America’s voters.

It’s clear that the Left could not be more wrong. I have traveled around the Nation and met countless Patriots, and it could not be more apparent that Donald has won over the American People.
The President needs your support right now. The Election is in 69 days, and the best way we can help secure four more years is by coming together as a strong, unified movement.

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
As I shared with you in my speech at the 2020 GOP Convention, my husband’s vision of a better, stronger, safer America is resonating with people all across the Nation.

I know that under Donald’s continued leadership and his critical America First Agenda, our nation will once again look forward to a booming economy, record job creation, low taxes, fewer government regulations, and a stronger position in the world. However, all of that will disappear if a radical left-wing Democrat takes over the White House.

I know you realize how much is at stake in November. As your First Lady, I am humbled and honored to do all that I can for America, and today, I am proud to do all I can to help my husband win this November.

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/97418f282348afbfc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

Have you seen my newest TV ad playing on the airwaves? It's all about draining The Swamp and boosting our economy.

Nothing will change if we keep sending the same people back to Washington. We need new people with new ideas. My USA Plan provides incentives to American businesses to bring manufacturing jobs back from China, and create new jobs here in New Hampshire.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/4f9cbff204fb329bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Click or Tap to Watch the New Ad! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/63780e4ae9d2241fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Politicians don't change their stripes. And we aren't going to revitalize our economy by sending D.C. Jeanne Shaheen back to Washington.

Receiving President Trump's endorsement is a huge honor, and I received it because of my policies that would mirror his America First agenda.

We need to bring back the economy so American families can preserve the American Dream. My USA Plan will limit government regulation so that Granite State small businesses and families aren't trying to stay afloat with one hand tied behind their back.

Peter, we have a tough road ahead of us. With only 13 days left until the September 8th Primary, I need your help.

[_**Will you make a contribution right now so that I can buy more air time with ads like this, and reach even more voters across the Granite State?**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/ec83fd3a757e1336c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Click or tap here. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/3278db216e841154c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/5aea26021aac6703c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9ddc0de9db0ad4e5/5836763155c72ffec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mSiJx7FGybUhm6PhTJWaZB9MiN667B_vazxlzBUmrrLPusByLxdqI0_8YiR6qcBn-Zc_Czzb3jxz8Pnl27Ux5dO_bVdvj0Fg5_aVhksZmBPpEUukDkx0KHLULJyCF0eVc8WwUIh01hWeajporXYR_hdqxXibrSOcyM0Q4h3Tjcs=&c=jUzAs8ioOdqerptVwBw93jilP9zKL9sYmpmXNLKlQSOSW9wIQQXmYw==&ch=IIidzZwGv-VSAT9uWbjsyfmSmrR9wPwlXjxD0MVzNtvODwLiHisfBQ==)
---
| Peter,
Last night was a historic moment in our movement to put America first, drain the swamp, and to stop the radical left that hates our great country.
To be clear, 2020 is about strength or weakness; energy or confusion; success or failure.
As President Trump's top defender and the #1 enemy of the "woke" radical-left, I delivered a speech last night at the RNC convention that outlined what is at stake this November.
If you missed it, you can [watch my speech here: ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mSiJx7FGybUhm6PhTJWaZB9MiN667B_vazxlzBUmrrLPusByLxdqI0_8YiR6qcBn-Zc_Czzb3jxz8Pnl27Ux5dO_bVdvj0Fg5_aVhksZmBPpEUukDkx0KHLULJyCF0eVc8WwUIh01hWeajporXYR_hdqxXibrSOcyM0Q4h3Tjcs=&c=jUzAs8ioOdqerptVwBw93jilP9zKL9sYmpmXNLKlQSOSW9wIQQXmYw==&ch=IIidzZwGv-VSAT9uWbjsyfmSmrR9wPwlXjxD0MVzNtvODwLiHisfBQ==)

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mSiJx7FGybUhm6PhTJWaZB9MiN667B_vazxlzBUmrrLPusByLxdqI0_8YiR6qcBn-Zc_Czzb3jxz8Pnl27Ux5dO_bVdvj0Fg5_aVhksZmBPpEUukDkx0KHLULJyCF0eVc8WwUIh01hWeajporXYR_hdqxXibrSOcyM0Q4h3Tjcs=&c=jUzAs8ioOdqerptVwBw93jilP9zKL9sYmpmXNLKlQSOSW9wIQQXmYw==&ch=IIidzZwGv-VSAT9uWbjsyfmSmrR9wPwlXjxD0MVzNtvODwLiHisfBQ==)
---
| You, me, the Silent Majority, and all freedom-loving Americans across our country know that there is no alternative if we fail - there is no other refuge for freedom.
America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Don't let any celebrity, athlete or politician tell you otherwise.
Donald Trump has my full and unwavering support this November, but I need to know that you are with me.
Can you rush in a [$45 donation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mSiJx7FGybUhm6PhTJWaZB9MiN667B_vazxlzBUmrrLPusByLxdqI0_8YiR6qcBnt_JM_-cuh6Ktr_X-f4ZblETScd6lD2wHysyOkwM1ryRQNZ7fLhzrlIoA1hn3mI39oOdTgpX_ubDM55Ld8qn74ozEZYO6z1aCWTdHbBUD5zo6l-UX_RfkUCBxVaqvbq_y&c=jUzAs8ioOdqerptVwBw93jilP9zKL9sYmpmXNLKlQSOSW9wIQQXmYw==&ch=IIidzZwGv-VSAT9uWbjsyfmSmrR9wPwlXjxD0MVzNtvODwLiHisfBQ==) to show the radical left, their best friends in the fake news media, and the globalist Deep State that hates President Trump that you are not going to cave into their woketopia agenda?
Our 45th president, Donald J. Trump, and I are the last things standing in front of the radical-left this November.
Please, don't wait...Donate $45 right now to support our 45th president.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Do you have a few moments today to take my socialism survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology Democrats are flirting with?

**SURVEY REQUEST** : Far-left extremists are taking over the Democrat Party and pose a clear and present danger to our democracy. **[Can you please spare a moment of your time to take my survey on socialism in America today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)**

Your input is invaluable.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oso7xQ5-N2) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)
---

Peter,

As I write this to you, **I'm simply at a loss for words** as to how the liberal elite have let fringe candidates take control of their party; I wonder if the folks in the Democrat Party realize they're about to promote the most extreme candidates into positions of real power.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)
Peter, a Gallup poll released last year revealed that **_43% of Americans "say socialism would be a good thing for the country_**."

**[I want to know what you think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)**

Do you have a few moments today to take my socialism survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology the far-left Democrats are flirting with?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)
Peter, there is a real and present danger that if we don't do everything in our power to re-elect President Trump and take back the House, we will be firmly on the path to socialism in this country.

If we don't do something right now to wake up Americans flirting with electing socialist sympathizers, it's going to be too late.

Together, we can win this election, re-elect a president who believes in capitalism, and put to rest any possibility of this country taking a left turn. **[I'm going to help lead the fight and I hope you'll be there right alongside me.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)**

For LIBERTY,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)
Jim Jordan

| [ **You have my support jim! ➠**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56110430:so7xQ5-N2:m:1:2247059263:B43B302297A466FF4952FAFE1F8895CE:r)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
| In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground – and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2de02ae2-aee7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/bd67866b-b9e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDY3ODY2Yi1iOWU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amYXkWa5saJ8HNfH0Jnd0u5TTmn0LH-VSZE0qohR7Vk=&id=108420485).

| | Folks ― it’s Nick, Mike Siegel’s campaign manager. We’ve built this campaign from the ground up thanks to folks like you! **We’re a growing movement and a growing campaign.** In just the last few weeks, we’ve staffed up and are hitting the ground running talking to TX-10 voters. _We’re only a few months away from Election Day, so we can’t stop now._ **It’s my main job to keep things running smoothly ― but we’re running behind on our End-of-Month goal at the moment.** This is a big problem if we want to flip this battleground district. name: Kamala Harris
subject: Why I'm not worried about the Republican convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
They're telling lie after lie, trying to scare the American people. |
---

Peter, I'm not worried about the Republican convention this week. But I am worried about the kind of money they are going to raise.

We already know these folks' M.O. They're telling lie after lie, trying to scare the American people into voting for four more years of their hateful and divisive agenda.

It couldn't be more different from our convention last week, where we laid out our plan for a future that includes everyone, not just the people on our side of the aisle.

**Peter, I'll let you decide whether or not to tune in, but before you go today, I have a favor to ask you.**

Donald Trump and the Republicans are going to raise a whole lot of money off of their fear mongering before the end of the week, so we're relaunching our Beat Trump Fund to make sure our message of hope and unity reaches voters across the country.

Our goal is 500,000 online donations before Trump takes the stage on Thursday night. It's ambitious, but we can reach it if everyone does their part.

[Peter, if you can spare $25 today, will you pitch in to hit this goal and help us share our vision of a better America with more voters? ](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B2_kdh-rnc_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B2_kdh-rnc_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b4b/494745793/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b4a/494745793/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b49/494745793/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b48/494745793/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b47/494745793/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b46/494745793/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b49/494745793/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7d0/1cd0ac28/16fc374da/357f3b44/494745793/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?=E2=9C=85_Jon_Ossoff_for_Senate?=
subject: out of touch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Perdue is not for the people. |
---
Friend,

David Perdue is out of touch with the interests of working families in Georgia.

He won't take time to do public town halls with Georgians and listen to the concerns of his constituents.

And amid an economic crisis, with Georgians struggling to pay rent and put food on their tables, Perdue has led the fight against expanding unemployment insurance.

**Perdue, one of the wealthiest Senators, is only in it to make himself and his wealthy friends richer.**

**_When COVID-19 was first hitting the nation, Perdue downplayed the crisis while privately trading stocks to line his pockets. Now, he has left Washington instead of staying to fight for Georgia families._**

We need a leader who will be accountable to Georgians and root out this corruption!

_Jon Ossoff will be that leader._

He is running a grassroots campaign powered by the people -- not corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 to help Jon beat Perdue and elect a leader who will represent the interests of working families in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2436/5b2c1286/3fbb813c/25f007e5/2750647911/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_out_of_touch?refcode=em_2020_08_26_out_of_touch&amount=10")** | | [DONATE NOW](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2436/5b2c1286/3fbb813c/25f007e5/2750647911/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_out_of_touch?refcode=em_2020_08_26_out_of_touch&amount=10")
---
Since the start of his campaign, Jon has held and attended over 100 free, public events -- both virtually and in-person -- where he's taken questions from Georgians. _He 's been holding virtual town halls nearly every week for the last two months._

**Friend, Jon will listen to the concerns of his constituents and put their interests first.**

When Georgians are struggling and need real solutions to their problems, Jon will work to get it done and not focus on pleasing wealthy donors or adding to his profit margin.

clean_body: Perdue is not for the people. | Friend, David Perdue is out of touch with the interests of working families in Georgia. He won't take time to do public town halls with Georgians and listen to the concerns of his constituents. And amid an economic crisis, with Georgians struggling to pay rent and put food on their tables, Perdue has led the fight against expanding unemployment insurance. Perdue, one of the wealthiest Senators, is only in it to make himself and his wealthy friends richer. When COVID-19 was first hitting the nation, Perdue downplayed the crisis while privately trading stocks to line his pockets. Now, he has left Washington instead of staying to fight for Georgia families. We need a leader who will be accountable to Georgians and root out this corruption! Jon Ossoff will be that leader. He is running a grassroots campaign powered by the people -- not corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. name: John Carney for Governor
subject: Only 24 Hours Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Dear Friend,

We are only one day away from my first campaign event of the year. Your support is essential to our re-election efforts and very much appreciated.

I hope to see you there.

Thursday
August 27th 6-7 p.m.

Thanks,
John Carney

Please join Join James Carville, President Clinton's Campaign Manager and Political Pundit in support of Governor Carney's re-election campaign for a virtual event.

Thursday, August 27, 2020
6:00 - 7:00 p.m.
Via Zoom
Login information will be sent to RSVPs week-of event

Suggested Contribution Levels: $1200 * $600 * $300

You can RSVP online by using this link: www.johncarney.org/carville or you can contact our campaign office by phone, 302-395-0707, or email, rsvp@johncarney.org.

Checks should be made payable to Friends For John Carney and mailed to:
Friends for John Carney, P.O. Box 2162, Wilmington, DE 19899

Team Carney

The Friends for John Carney Campaign may accept contributions from individuals, corporations, labor organizations, partnerships, and other entities up to $1,200 per election period. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Only individuals who are American citizens or permanent resident aliens that reside in the United States may contribute. In addition, only corporations who are incorporated in the United States, who utilize U.S. proceeds for the contribution, and for which the decision to contribute was made by an American citizen or permanent resident alien may contribute.

Contributions from corporations, companies, organizations, incorporated or unincorporated associations, general or limited partnerships, or other entities that contribute must:
- Include the full names and mailing addresses of all individuals who own a legal or equitable interest of 50% or greater in that entity, or notify us that no such person exists (the entity’s contribution is allocated pro-rata to identified persons, subject to limits);
-Include a responsible party if the aggregate amount of contributions during the election period exceeds $100; and
-Include the following form: http://elections.delaware.gov/pubs/cf_corporate_contribution_notice.pdf.

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: You guessed it: another endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/207219e939f7/you-guessed-it-another-endorsement?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I am thrilled to announce that our campaign has been endorsed by LPAC! Over the past eight years, LPAC has worked tirelessly to elect LGBTQ+ women who are committed to their shared values of women’s equality, LGBTQ+ equality, and social justice. LPAC’s support has been instrumental in electing countless LGBTQ+ women over the years and getting them a place at the table. If you haven’t noticed, this is the **third major endorsement** I have received in the past five days. **Now that is momentum. ** [Let’s keep that momentum going, chip in here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5d548b60ea&e=140a9b81e7) My opponent’s record when it comes to these values is abysmal. He has voted **against the Equality Act** , which would have prohibited discrimination against LGBTQ+ individuals. He co-signed a letter calling for the **full repeal of Roe v. Wade.** The people of the Illinois 16th district deserve better. When I am elected to Congress, I will fight tooth and nail for social justice. I am committed to expanding the rights of women and LGBTQ+ people, and I look forward to continuing this fight once elected. But before I can fight for these rights on the House floor, I have to win this election. [Can you contribute today so that we can unseat an anti-women, anti-LGBTQ+ Congressman and replace him with someone who will fight for you?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7a49e53453&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Senior Staff, MJ for Texas
subject: From day one, MJ has taken the pandemic seriously. Sen. Cornyn hasn't.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Don't our students, teachers, and school workers deserve better leadership?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb67/1496862224/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb66/1496862224/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.1nd__1988__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Across Texas, teachers and school workers are scared of catching the virus.

Children are scared that they'll get sick.

Parents are scared that their kids might feel fine but unknowingly pass the virus to their grandparents.

**_This_ is the environment we're sending our students, teachers, and school workers back into?** Don't we deserve better than this from "leaders" like Sen. John Cornyn?
**[Donate to replace Sen. Cornyn with MJ Hegar](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb65/1496862224/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODgiLCJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.1nd__1988__&amount=10")**
Sen. Cornyn's lack of leadership has failed Texas. From joking about the coronavirus during the pandemic's early days to making false claims that kids can't spread it, he's failed to keep our schools safe.

**But MJ is different. From day one, she 's taken this pandemic seriously -- because she's the mother of two young boys, one of whom just started kindergarten.** She knows firsthand how difficult this school year will be for so many students, parents, teachers, and school workers.

If we send her to the Senate, she'll move heaven and earth to make our schools -- and our kids -- as safe as possible. **[Can you chip in today? Texans deserve a senator who takes our health seriously.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb65/1496862224/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODgiLCJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.1nd__1988__&amount=10")**

\-- Senior Staff, MJ for Texas

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb65/1496862224/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODgiLCJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.1nd__1988__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb64/1496862224/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5ODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1988&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ff2/7f51f7bc/439da080/4ef7cb5b/1496862224/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Releases Digital Ad: "America's Story"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Wesley Hunt Releases TV Ad: "America's Story"**

Houston, TX - Today, Wesley Hunt, Houston native and combat veteran fighting to restore conservative values to Houston, released his first TV advertisement of the general election, _[America's Story](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bb2ffe8eea5a419d9b9f13b87f949604&_e=UjBHQuIKMJsowehnsc5DznSbCW9-3Km-lnP1i3zuXythGthpxumX__mpAuaRgvsYNSyvzxVuDY7vCXYXzdRrU7hUc1P6ZxbUnuSEceh2l6IeKMt8nlVNT5aRjHMRFuV6YJHc7dbu4v3iEbunKY3s3KX7VvZWfSYc1O1EVu_d0CCTG2xJ6w8K5v-yrLdIvon2KtgokVTP6rKSKFbqdvo2eOncXMUyYGB6cn_jLI6s8jmMmgHouC3--hYn5AAfQdRPlLWUoLNH4MlQbVoP89-QKMn1xgiI4K5rp48foFWLK-Of2ZIFD_t1-V52SLiKS_93py8gKqCBxTuRF4zNXSpU7yjB9EFwg_rrr9RS84sF3WOZKqRgsgNkorpvGTpnD3xjEvmcyJYBL0y3GyJ5Nw54ffaciI6B9R7ZdZDljIRv6sfM5jOrltXCcF8hqy6Y7rpvPN3dU6iBkIDS-kskRt7PKaRG1p7C2Pm-5IG-vjOf123q4O8yIx0QiGfFkzjooRKLAb2eEfqqpPMgq8D7FXZRQJgx2wBXY_LhI9rK8b9lnIZ6GZv506SbK4EkohLHEQLmGS6ak-EP50ivYmVfYoF4fhWdJ_s3Ucid2jGgbpp7FqIBredhzrnEePx4yOlUqh1_nBiU9hvjHzEJUbP31Zq60hgIiuusUx79UWVDn1OhRbLdF5wH13VfegWiXMzHUBBG9HPcSvJ-7Pr2oq9yPTCto5ws0aEKnwG75fzRcy_AcVFzO-2SK7O33vhFx9vEE75MSSAtxBmaGGmHJUTk-gLZH88hz8Lr_3Y1ReD4i61MnRs%3D)._ _America's Story_ encapsulates the Hunt family story, rising from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations, as well as Hunt's dedication to preserving the American Dream for future generations.

_"The American Dream is alive and well today, and my family is living proof,"_ said **Hunt**. _"America is the only country in the world where my family's story, a journey from slavery to West Point in just five generations, is possible. As a Nation, we should celebrate the progress we have made and build upon it so that the next generation is able to participate in the way of life we have fought to protect. As the next Congressman for Texas' 7th Congressional District I will work to ensure the same opportunities endure for generations to come."_

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bb2ffe8eea5a419d9b9f13b87f949604&_e=AODZkKN7sD6K6Z-nErPv3KaUibYxKxBKkSVEo4rRvW4TYoPLmtrIJZWSgWaI-hRUFoDf1LKoU-7AOSaK3uiBOZaelqXuLByGwphvylW8B8mdYquBXA3Kqlw7E4etE8M6I_gK4o8sNMuCmQqxJkTW47rCcdYEUZzEa0hvrRvmmNbLyc4pdL_qbDgvOYPo5nCxJeaIDIP-gKbGj4c5H3o4KzEBVY5WykUXau4rZq3ltWxBxZknzSFVdHRHwrM21BzLK6cWYuJd2rnXDNXJpr4_CgqqDDboAFP0pPIu9B3UeNkg2uRY7N1e7IhOhbrTQMNS)
[Click here to watch _America's Story_.](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bb2ffe8eea5a419d9b9f13b87f949604&_e=AODZkKN7sD6K6Z-nErPv3KaUibYxKxBKkSVEo4rRvW4TYoPLmtrIJZWSgWaI-hRUFoDf1LKoU-7AOSaK3uiBOZaelqXuLByGwphvylW8B8lgSy_IjrUV0TfDDZPHZ0uhMcgPJrtuqb-d8fyB96rXXy_vdSZUW7mjqsNjmxwjXcIOI6Wn543LW-sl2ADbjFXaCq8ol583SArwZMDFrKYXom_NfzMZShusO4O2O4Xp7qZAS5zjrlKxNlazigdrT2ocdyOQGYZV4ZifHSKV9XQJdhVevjCRJQAlmgB8BqSVNZ9FEoVk_VtqE9COT_k2Nkut)

Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.

###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bb2ffe8eea5a419d9b9f13b87f949604&_e=AODZkKN7sD6K6Z-nErPv3M8G51LD5i5cKV_AEFhH1-MV7hCgqtNHHo9da4sqdWgt6WhPXGZT7ldz-Mv4QdzuM-Z2lYcbdCOlhd8bchHz5auOK21zyxC3RWplHZZF4kDaWT2Kdt7vqMYHbdUs30V6IbpNtq7lChAc24SfzuNlEvTw6s-Cl0oK8cklt_O-tpBtUAyPFexyowOp3doPZ0tjNrMppGbdoNYU5E6z3kWd6rZimtbN7ST8XCqTx8Ht_A9MBcHBR1j1KU1qLp768X4_EpaxZla8FOrLC0bT4QD7y64%3D)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Two visions for America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
Two conventions, two differing visions for America. Democrats are solely focused on one person: Donald Trump. Republicans are focused on 330 million people: Americans.

**Republicans have a plan for securing our communities and creating jobs.**

**Democrats** want to **suppress freedoms, liberties and opportunities**. They **support rioters, and oppose law enforcement**. They want **a full government takeover of healthcare, new taxes, open borders, a ban on Texas energy production**, and trillions of dollars spent on misguided "green" policies. Make no mistake, **the Democrat party's agenda is increasingly controlled by the woke left, where the only police that are supported are the thought police**.

**My opponent, Colin Allred, votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time, and with AOC 93%. He is entirely committed to furthering the oppressive progressive agenda** that will ruin everything that makes Texas the most desirable place in the nation to live, work, and raise a family.

**There is a better way. I will put Texas and Texans first. **[Will you support our fight with a donation of $100, $250, $1,000 or more today?](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=4ff854b80c&e=68aaeb0998)

We must **empower Americans with the freedom to make their own healthcare choices**, while ensuring that nobody is denied for a preexisting condition. We need a modern immigration system that focuses on **securing the border and attracting the world's best and brightest** to come seek the American Dream. We must **support our law enforcement and build strong communities** , so that every single American can live in peace and security. We need a **strong free market economy and robust job creation** so that **all Americans have the opportunity to reach their potential** and achieve their dream.

**I'm a problem solver** , not another politician who votes how the party bosses in DC tell me. The 32nd Congressional District already has one of those representatives, and he has failed.

[**Please support my campaign for Congress today**](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=7577c70d36&e=68aaeb0998), and let's take back this seat for the people of the 32nd district.

Thank you, and God bless!
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

He is entirely committed to furthering the oppressive progressive agenda that will ruin everything that makes Texas the most desirable place in the nation to live, work, and raise a family. There is a better way. I will put Texas and Texans first. We must empower Americans with the freedom to make their own healthcare choices, while ensuring that nobody is denied for a preexisting condition. We need a modern immigration system that focuses on securing the border and attracting the world's best and brightest to come seek the American Dream. We must support our law enforcement and build strong communities , so that every single American can live in peace and security. We need a strong free market economy and robust job creation so that all Americans have the opportunity to reach their potential and achieve their dream. I'm a problem solver , not another politician who votes how the party bosses in DC tell me. The 32nd Congressional District already has one of those representatives, and he has failed. , and let's take back this seat for the people of the 32nd district. Thank you, and God bless! | | Genevieve Collins Republican Nominee Texas Congressional District 32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC | | Copyright © 2020 COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC., All rights reserved.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, will you let the mob win?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Since being announced as a keynote speaker at the Republican National Convention on Thursday night, the liberal mob has been launching vicious, personal attacks against me. They want me to back out of speaking at the Convention. Guess what: I'm not backing out.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Since being announced as a keynote speaker at the Republican National Convention on Thursday night, the liberal mob has been **launching vicious, personal attacks against me.**

They want me to back out of speaking at the Convention.

Guess what: _**I 'm not backing out.**_

I've already run some of the most aggressive ads against Joe Biden this cycle, and _I 'm just getting started._

Peter, I know these attacks from the Left are only going to intensify over the next few days. In order to be prepared, I have activated an [**Emergency Response Fund**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to help combat the lies and attacks from the Left.

Instead of just getting attacked, [**let 's expose Joe Biden for being a puppet of the Chinese Communist Party.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Here's the ad that I need your help to air far and wide:

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****Emergency Response Fund****
---
**DEADLINE: 8/27/2020
EMAIL: ****[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
DONATION: UNCONFIRMED**

I have set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 before I speak at the RNC Thursday night. That will allow me to hit Biden where he is most vulnerable. [**Will you step up and make a donation of $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford to my Emergency Response fund?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The stakes for this election could not be higher. If enough Americans become aware of Biden's ties to Communist China, I'm confident that he will lose and we can **re-elect President Trump for four more years.**

Peter, time is running out to ensure we have the resources to fight back and hit Biden. [**Chip in whatever you can afford to my Emergency Response Fund.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyOTg1NjYS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMjEwMjU1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In Service,

Tom Cotton

Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. Now he’s officially secured the nomination for the GOP ticket for President in 2020! **President Trump accepted the nomination at the Republican National Convention, and I have never been prouder to consider myself an ally to this great leader**. As we’ve seen from the last four years, the D.C. Democrats are going to oppose him at every turn. That’s why he needs more people in his corner in Washington, who will have his back to defend his America First policies. Will you please chip in now to my Senate campaign, so we can send D.C. | | **At the start of this campaign,** we set out to build a grassroots, people-focused campaign that we could be proud of. Our team’s goal has always been to bring real leadership and solutions to the working people of Kentucky’s 6th District. **We started out far behind in fundraising, facing an opponent with powerful corporate backers and a big head start.** But, thanks to folks like you chipping in whatever you could, we were able to close the fundraising gap between Josh and his opponent last quarter. And we did it without taking a dime from dark money donors. **To put it simply: grassroots supporters like you are the difference in this race.** When Josh is elected to Congress, there will be no question who he’s working for, because our campaign is fueled by YOU. With just 10 weeks left until the election, every day, every dollar, and every donor matters in our effort to flip this seat. **Now** , we’re charging full steam ahead towards Election Day. Our TV and digital ads are live — and we were up on air nearly _a week_ before our opponent. We were able to define ourselves before the attack ads came pouring in. clean_body: First, we set out to build a grassroots movement. Then, thanks to folks like you chippining in whatever they could, we were able to close the fundraising gap between me and my opponent. Now, we’re charging full steam ahead towards Election Day. | = | | At the start of this campaign, we set out to build a grassroots, people-focused campaign that we could be proud of. Our team’s goal has always been to bring real leadership and solutions to the working people of Kentucky’s 6th District. We started out far behind in fundraising, facing an opponent with powerful corporate backers and a big head start. But, thanks to folks like you chipping in whatever you could, we were able to close the fundraising gap between Josh and his opponent last quarter. And we did it without taking a dime from dark money donors. To put it simply: grassroots supporters like you are the difference in this race. When Josh is elected to Congress, there will be no question who he’s working for, because our campaign is fueled by YOU. With just 10 weeks left until the election, every day, every dollar, and every donor matters in our effort to flip this seat. Now , we’re charging full steam ahead towards Election Day. Our TV and digital ads are live — and we were up on air nearly a week before our opponent. We were able to define ourselves before the attack ads came pouring in. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = \- Team Hicks | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. Today is National Dog Day, but instead of celebrating me, I want to use my time in the spotlight to remind you how hard Rita is working every day on this campaign. That's why we need to help her win -- we know we can trust her to do right by every single one of us. **[So, instead of treats or toys for National Dog Day, I have a favor to ask. body:
The right to vote allows us to choose our government and hold it accountable to the people it is meant to serve.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18860073/242080559/462758527?refcode=em_pet_2020.08.26_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=035ac9be-cfe7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzVhYzliZS1jZmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKqyqs2Mw35tpEDvLDCGNoh-Fp7V2U80bdho4ilHs2g=) Team,

**In August 1965, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law.** This monumental legislation was a hard fought victory of the Civil Rights Movement and outlawed discriminatory voting practices, securing the right to vote for all Americans.

[**Yet 55 years later, many still face barriers to casting their ballot. If we want to honor the memories of Civil Rights icons like the late Representative John Lewis, we must take action to protect voting rights for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18860074/242080560/-2130329904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzVhYzliZS1jZmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKqyqs2Mw35tpEDvLDCGNoh-Fp7V2U80bdho4ilHs2g=&emci=9169ccff-c3e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=035ac9be-cfe7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249) | [Protect the right to vote »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18860075/242080561/-2130329904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzVhYzliZS1jZmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKqyqs2Mw35tpEDvLDCGNoh-Fp7V2U80bdho4ilHs2g=&emci=9169ccff-c3e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=035ac9be-cfe7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249)
---

**Team, the right to vote allows us to choose our government and hold it accountable to the people it is meant to serve.** And voter suppression laws disproportionately impact the most vulnerable among us -- including people of color, the elderly, and the disabled.

[**As we approach the most consequential election of our lifetime, it’s crucial that we’re ensuring people from every background have the opportunity to fully participate. Will you join Eugene in calling on Congress to protect the right to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18860076/242080562/-2130329904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzVhYzliZS1jZmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKqyqs2Mw35tpEDvLDCGNoh-Fp7V2U80bdho4ilHs2g=&emci=9169ccff-c3e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=035ac9be-cfe7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249) [Add my name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18860077/242080563/-2130329904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzVhYzliZS1jZmU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GKqyqs2Mw35tpEDvLDCGNoh-Fp7V2U80bdho4ilHs2g=&emci=9169ccff-c3e7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=035ac9be-cfe7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249)

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Honor women!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , Today we celebrate Women's Equality Day commemorating the ratification of the 19th Amendment which granted women the right to vote. However, we cannot mark Women's Equality Day without remembering the voters of color who were not included in the 19th Amendment victory a century ago-- not until the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that women of color were more effectively granted suffrage. I stand on the shoulders of these women who fought for the right to vote and be included in every part of society. Many inequalities still exist for women, particularly women of color. Please listen [to my opening speech at the DNC last week that underscores how I am committed to fighting for "a country that is fair and just" for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/Z95LVlWWu0waIw4ochgLWxYvSrwW-T9gsucPvbMEKGI=) We are also midway through the week and the Republicans are at in full force, spreading lies and further promoting Fear and Division. Last night we heard a speaker who said: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/wD1wTPctTZuDM1JhjifytnKAyNob-aplA597WPsVi50=) We have had **ENOUGH** of Trump's "Make America great again" taking us back to a time when we were silenced and marginalized. The time has come to stand up and take our country **FORWARD**. Please watch my opening speech to kick off the Democratic National Convention, together we will win! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/6U-z8a9IXU6noIep5_aEojK7ELwRCDhRXYvePHf2fIw=) **[Will you honor the women on whose shoulders we stand and send a message to the RNC that PA will be BLUE and Nina Ahmad will be the next Auditor General of PA?](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/mZ2k_nhKBvs0W4MK5UPxuP02URkRUyM5ot5-qDp3ETQ=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/97NIFx6a6ieiKBsm2IyHsjD4tgxYKHKXo72lfjTyF8Y=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/VSwgARTYEGaCPP8P9SLFtzG_ooopANuSdSU2pwR5Wfo=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/jgNj-8rN5ucjjlcv7_GbqkkniF5ODelzdmEZ5GfWd3Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/WrRu9_8emAIB5nN5kDgmEp4sMoBp6PQJTG7AuXO41kA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F0HaHPf8OJ02DNhQ6pnhlWPjksghkKV-aHNIaAojYKo=/Eu-Edn2J6JDh4Niuatf0r7YPZCQD1VvLOGCF-u-qaJQ=?hl=en)

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: 100 years
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LefTDxI9gxD4wakHtL6GCiisKD89sUh_UPlfNTtV3YA=/D2OHi5qg66ra_AGvWZN4gsbBWzxoaWhq6SC7FDie8WM=?refcode=082620)
| | Friend, 100 years after the ratification of the 19th Amendment, guaranteeing white women the right to vote, I am proud to share just how far the House DFL has come. **This year 68 women, a majority of our candidates, are running as DFLers for State House.** Two-thirds of our leadership positions are held by women, including several amazing women of color. **We 've accomplished a lot over the years as we strive for equality, but there is still so much left to do. **This year, as we cross the threshold of a century, we find ourselves looking at things through a very different lens: racial discrimination, the COVID-19 pandemic, and the Trump presidency have all brought into clear light the inequality still present in our society.
* Women are still paid less for the same work as men -- for women of color, it's even worse.
* Paid family leave and earned sick and safe time are desperately needed for families and especially working mothers as our federal government struggles to control the COVID-19 pandemic and our children go back to school.
* Access to reproductive health care is under attack across the country and by the President.

There is still a lot of work ahead of us until all women, and especially women of color, are treated equally under the law. Let's get to work, grow our House Majority, take back the White House, and build a future where everyone has the opportunity to thrive, no exceptions. **Will you make an investment in our campaign today?** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LefTDxI9gxD4wakHtL6GCiisKD89sUh_UPlfNTtV3YA=/D2OHi5qg66ra_AGvWZN4gsbBWzxoaWhq6SC7FDie8WM=?refcode=082620) Thank you. In solidarity, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LefTDxI9gxD4wakHtL6GCiisKD89sUh_UPlfNTtV3YA=/D2OHi5qg66ra_AGvWZN4gsbBWzxoaWhq6SC7FDie8WM=?refcode=082620)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump's Growing List of Foreign Policy Successes
body:
It’s long past time for President Trump’s detractors to admit he has had quite a string of successes when it comes to foreign policy | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37d9f653e4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump's Growing List of Foreign Policy Successes**

“It’s long past time for President Trump’s detractors to admit he has had quite a string of successes when it comes to foreign policy,” Martha Boneta writes in _Townhall_.

“Trump was elected on high-profile domestic issues–cutting taxes, closing the borders, and deregulation. He has addressed all of these. But he also has been perhaps the most consequential president in our lifetimes with regard to foreign policy.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b872d1b078&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump has issued a full pardon for Jon Ponder, a convicted bank robber from Nevada who started a post-prison program known as Hope for Prisoners, to help people re-enter society,” Caitlin McFall writes. “I will continue to give all Americans, including former inmates, the best chance to build a new life and achieve their own American dream,” President Trump said. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ac64f1d83&e=3ee4985eea).

🎬 **WATCH:**[**President Trump signs full pardon for Jon Ponder**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df5bbf6045&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Seattle Police said demonstrations are turning into direct attacks on police. One spokesperson called it 'attempted murder' when rioters tried to trap officers inside the East Precinct Monday night before setting fires. New SPD surveillance video from the East Precinct shows rioters setting fires around the precinct, after trying to cement the door shut, while officers are inside,” Tammy Mutasa reports for [KOMO News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4753917f9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The White House announced today that “federal agencies and their private sector partners are committing more than $1 billion over the next five years to establish 12 new research institutes focused on artificial intelligence and quantum information sciences,” Jared Council writes. “It is absolutely imperative the United States continues to lead the world in AI and quantum,” U.S. Chief Technology Officer Michael Kratsios said. Read more in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fec75343e3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22c5b02c68&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cec010d4ed&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7bd873fad4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: re: Mike Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As a Hoosier myself, born and raised here in Indiana, I'm no stranger to Vice President Pence's divisive, anti-LGBTQ politics. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, it's Pete Buttigieg. Tonight, Vice President Mike Pence will speak at the Republican National Convention. And that makes this a good day to send a message. [Before he takes the stage, will you send a message and make one of the 290,000 grassroots donations Joe Biden's campaign still needs this week to help defeat Pence and Trump?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

As a Hoosier myself, born and raised here in Indiana, I'm no stranger to Vice President Pence's divisive, anti-LGBTQ politics, and I've certainly never hesitated to stand up to his agenda of imposing an archaic worldview, stripping countless Americans--including me--of their rights.

Like I said early on in my own campaign for president last year, _" I wish the Mike Pences of the world would understand -- that if you've got a problem with who I am, your problem is not with me. Your quarrel, sir, is with my creator."_

I don't expect him to come around. Yet, it is still jarring that a man rooted in faith and scripture would punch the clock every day for a boss whose conduct flies in the face of every notion, liberal and conservative, of basic morals or decency.

Donald Trump and Mike Pence's Administration has been a festival of greed and corruption. Peter, you and I are the ones who can do something over the next 69 days to end their time in office and elect service-driven leaders in Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

[Look, I know it's a tough time to contribute, but Joe's team has set an ambitious and necessary fundraising goal to collect 500,000 grassroots donations before the Republican National Convention ends. They're just 290,000 donations away from reaching it, and I'm hoping we can make a big dent in that number before Pence speaks tonight.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

[So I'm asking you directly Peter, will you dig deep and chip in $25 right now to defeat Mike Pence and Donald Trump this November?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B1_pete_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for standing on the right side of history,

_Pete Buttigieg_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38aa/2890894672/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a9/2890894672/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a8/2890894672/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a7/2890894672/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a6/2890894672/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a5/2890894672/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a4/2890894672/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a3/2890894672/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a2/2890894672/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a1/2890894672/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f38a4/2890894672/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7f0/1cd0ac28/16ff53d4e/357f389f/2890894672/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

subject: Please help me fight Pelosi and the Dems in Indiana

body:
Conservative Victoria Spartz’s opponent was endorsed by Barack Obama! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469690?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=590c5e989b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

| Hoosier Republican,

Top-name liberals are quickly trying to tip the congressional race in our 5th District from “toss-up” to “Democrat,” and I need your help NOW before it’s too late!

Earlier this month, Barack Obama endorsed my opponent in this battleground race, Christina Hale. Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris and Pete Buttigieg have thrown their weight behind her, too!

That means my Democratic opponent is backed by the full weight of the liberal money machine, and the deep-pocketed leftist donors that have a habit of stealing elections from principled conservatives.

**My campaign relies almost solely on you — the hardworking men and women of America who are just trying to do a good day’s work for a decent wage to support their families**.

These are the people who will be hurt the most by the Democrats’ socialist agenda, and the people whose rights and freedoms I vow to protect in Congress.

**Will you please chip in what you can now to help me fight the liberal machine in Indiana?**
