Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris and Pete Buttigieg have thrown their weight behind her, too! That means my Democratic opponent is backed by the full weight of the liberal money machine, and the deep-pocketed leftist donors that have a habit of stealing elections from principled conservatives. My campaign relies almost solely on you — the hardworking men and women of America who are just trying to do a good day’s work for a decent wage to support their families. These are the people who will be hurt the most by the Democrats’ socialist agenda, and the people whose rights and freedoms I vow to protect in Congress. Will you please chip in what you can now to help me fight the liberal machine in Indiana? | "DONATE $5 TO DEFEAT THE DEMS >> " | "DONATE $10 TO DEFEAT THE DEMS >> " | "DONATE $35 TO DEFEAT THE DEMS >> " | "DONATE $50 TO DEFEAT THE DEMS >> " | It’s obvious that the DC Democrats are scared they are going to lose big in 2020 if they are going after the heartland so hard. We have to fight back just as hard to keep this seat RED and win back our majority in the House. ✔️**ZERO corporate PAC funding**
| [SUPPORT SRI FOR CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18861499/242121209/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.26_jd_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWM0MDQyMi1kZGU3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqhX-kuuTD8IwApKEDwAgc5FKY9IS8lB6IhfnBzG8nE=)

name: ChristyforCongress.org
subject: Mike Garcia voted "no" on #SaveThePostOffice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Mike Garcia is in Congress right now because of mail-in ballots.

But now -- when allowing folks to vote from home threatens his and Trump's reelection chances -- Trump's go-to lackey in Southern California is _refusing_ to save the USPS so it has the resources to handle our ballots this fall.

**On Saturday, Mike chose to vote "no" on the House's bill to save the Postal Service** \-- which we already rely on to deliver essentials like medications and which will become even more crucial when every single Californian will be mailed a ballot.

The people of the 25th district deserve better than a representative who will happily accept mail-in voting when it serves his own interests but suppresses their votes when it doesn't. **The hypocrisy is outrageous.**

_Peter, it's time to send Mike packing._

**[To defeat him, we need to make sure every Christy supporter in CA-25 returns their ballot right away so their vote is counted and their voice heard. Pitch in $5 to make it happen.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bda1/29776869/95b24b4/569ebdfa/778897542/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MjZfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200826_usps_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bda1/29776869/95b24b4/569ebdfb/778897542/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MjZfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200826_usps_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bda1/29776869/95b24b4/569ebdf4/778897542/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MjZfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200826_usps_in&express_lane=true&amount=25")

**The right to vote is fundamental, and amidst this public health crisis, it's sad that we even have to say it, but no one should have to risk their life to exercise that right.**

Keeping our Postal Service funded is the key to ensuring that every voter is able to safely and securely cast their ballot this year -- and Mike Garcia knows it.

Overcoming the GOP efforts to undermine the USPS, and by extension, our votes won't be easy. But we absolutely can do it if we make sure every CA-25 voter is registered to vote and returns their ballot right away.

**[Please rush $5 right now so we can ramp up our GOTV efforts, protect people's vote, and stop the sabotage of the USPS.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bda1/29776869/95b24b4/569ebdfa/778897542/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MjZfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200826_usps_in")**

Team Christy

clean_body: | []() | | Peter, Mike Garcia is in Congress right now because of mail-in ballots. But now -- when allowing folks to vote from home threatens his and Trump's reelection chances -- Trump's go-to lackey in Southern California is refusing to save the USPS so it has the resources to handle our ballots this fall. On Saturday, Mike chose to vote "no" on the House's bill to save the Postal Service \-- which we already rely on to deliver essentials like medications and which will become even more crucial when every single Californian will be mailed a ballot. The people of the 25th district deserve better than a representative who will happily accept mail-in voting when it serves his own interests but suppresses their votes when it doesn't. The hypocrisy is outrageous. Peter, it's time to send Mike packing. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" The right to vote is fundamental, and amidst this public health crisis, it's sad that we even have to say it, but no one should have to risk their life to exercise that right. Keeping our Postal Service funded is the key to ensuring that every voter is able to safely and securely cast their ballot this year -- and Mike Garcia knows it. Overcoming the GOP efforts to undermine the USPS, and by extension, our votes won't be easy. But we absolutely can do it if we make sure every CA-25 voter is registered to vote and returns their ballot right away. "" Thanks, Team Christy "" Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

body:
Jon's opponent is Trump's "favorite Senator" |
---
Friend,

Donald Trump is going all out to help Jon Ossoff's corrupt opponent David Perdue, his "favorite Senator."

**_Perdue is one of Trump 's biggest enablers and allies in the Senate_** \-- which is why Trump and the GOP are spending MILLIONS to save his seat.

Perdue, who has pitched himself as Trump's first-term co-pilot, boasts of his influence with the President and believes that the Trump agenda is actually working.

_And during this pandemic, Perdue has followed Trump 's lead and downplayed the crisis, putting millions of American lives at risk._

**The people of Georgia deserve a leader like Jon Ossoff who will stand up for their needs, not cower to an incompetent demagogue president.**

**[Friend, can you donate $10 to send Jon to Washington to fight for all Georgians?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2410/5b2c1286/3fbfada1/25f00568/3024647814/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally?refcode=em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally&amount=10")** | | [DONATE NOW](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2410/5b2c1286/3fbfada1/25f00568/3024647814/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally?refcode=em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally&amount=10")
---
David Perdue has voted with Trump 95% of his time in office.

Perdue voted to jeopardize health care for millions of Americans, cut taxes for millionaires and billionaires, and opposed loan relief for defrauded students.

**_This is not what hard-working Georgians need to succeed in this country. They need access to affordable health care, lower taxes, and debt relief._**

**Friend, Perdue is more concerned with the interests of Trump than the people of Georgia.**

David Perdue refuses to condemn Trump's repeated racist, sexist, and dangerous tweets. Including Trump's praise just last week of the extreme "QAnon" conspiracy movement.

We deserve leaders who understand Georgians' problems and work to solve them -- and Jon Ossoff is that leader.

**[Chip in today to help Jon beat Perdue and elect a Senator for all of Georgia.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2410/5b2c1286/3fbfada1/25f0056b/3024647814/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally?refcode=em_2020_08_26_perdue_trump_ally")**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: I'm a Trump Delegate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=vgLvohJfz6eC11BF11.bWQ)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm also a delegate to the Republican National Convention, so I wanted to give you an update of what I'm seeing!**

I'm proud that our state is hosting the Republican Convention- not so proud however, that our freedom-hating Democrat governor tried to chase us away. How DARE he?
_**This is what the anti-American, anti-free speech Democrats do now, isn't it? They act like Republicans don't even have a right to exist!**_
In fact, the news here today is that Pelosi called Republicans the "enemies of the state".
Pelosi has gone full Stalinist. You never go full Stalinist. Rep. Steve Scalise from Louisiana was shot and almost killed by a deranged "Bernie Bro" because he believed Bernie's insane rhetoric like this.
**_If Pelosi's rhetoric gets someone killed, she should get tossed in jail as an accessory to murder._**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=dUS0_xwKk4sgbg10KFlAyA)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=dUS0_xwKk4sgbg10KFlAyA)
---

_But you know what gives me so much hope? All these great Americans coming together in support of President Trump._

**I was particularly pleased to meet fellow North Carolinian Madison Cawthorn, who will be the next Congressman from Western NC. I look forward to joining him next year!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=dUS0_xwKk4sgbg10KFlAyA)
---

**_The difference with the Democrat Convention is striking. They banished God; excuse violence; blame innocent people; disparage job creators; and call anyone who doesn't agree with them, a "racist". _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**We are all God's children and Americans- and we need leadership who sees us as valued and equal!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=dUS0_xwKk4sgbg10KFlAyA) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=icpkIsPM73Nxmng&b=dUS0_xwKk4sgbg10KFlAyA), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm also a delegate to the Republican National Convention, so I wanted to give you an update of what I'm seeing! I'm proud that our state is hosting the Republican Convention- not so proud however, that our freedom-hating Democrat governor tried to chase us away. How DARE he? This is what the anti-American, anti-free speech Democrats do now, isn't it? They act like Republicans don't even have a right to exist! In fact, the news here today is that Pelosi called Republicans the "enemies of the state". Pelosi has gone full Stalinist. You never go full Stalinist. Rep. Steve Scalise from Louisiana was shot and almost killed by a deranged "Bernie Bro" because he believed Bernie's insane rhetoric like this. If Pelosi's rhetoric gets someone killed, she should get tossed in jail as an accessory to murder. But you know what gives me so much hope? All these great Americans coming together in support of President Trump. I was particularly pleased to meet fellow North Carolinian Madison Cawthorn, who will be the next Congressman from Western NC. I look forward to joining him next year! The difference with the Democrat Convention is striking. They banished God; excuse violence; blame innocent people; disparage job creators; and call anyone who doesn't agree with them, a "racist". You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do. THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here! We are all God's children and Americans- and we need leadership who sees us as valued and equal! Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I . Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: My conversation with Abby Johnson
body:
Watch this amazing conversation I had with Abby Johnson about abortion, and her transformation to become a Pro-Life activist! | | | |
---
| **Watch my Conversation with Abby!**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Watch this amazing conversation I had with Abby Johnson. If you have not seen it yet, check it out!

Abby Johnson is a former Planned Parenthood clinic director that resigned to be a Pro-Life advocate. Abby is frequently seen on national news networks, she just spoke at the Republican National Convention, she travels the globe, has authored a nationally best selling book, and founded the organization “And Then There Were None”.

The recent movie “Unplanned” was about her amazing story.

Abby was really phenomenal in this conversation, and it was so helpful. We talked about her story, standing for the unborn, how women can find healing after an abortion, and more.

Click the Blue Conversation Link button below, watch the interview, and email me with any of your thoughts.**

**Also, I had the privilege of meeting IL State Senator Dan McConchie recently. He is a tremendous man of faith that is humble, hardworking, diligent, and focused on serving others. (See photo below).

God bless you.

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=25649437d0&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=375b5eaef3&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**
---
| [Conversation Link](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=65acc8bd3b&e=b78e7c4d40 "Conversation Link")

|
---
|

clean_body: Watch this amazing conversation I had with Abby Johnson about abortion, and her transformation to become a Pro-Life activist! | | | | | Watch my Conversation with Abby! | | | | Hi Friends! Watch this amazing conversation I had with Abby Johnson. If you have not seen it yet, check it out! Abby Johnson is a former Planned Parenthood clinic director that resigned to be a Pro-Life advocate. Abby is frequently seen on national news networks, she just spoke at the Republican National Convention, she travels the globe, has authored a nationally best selling book, and founded the organization “And Then There Were None”. The recent movie “Unplanned” was about her amazing story. Abby was really phenomenal in this conversation, and it was so helpful. We talked about her story, standing for the unborn, how women can find healing after an abortion, and more. Click the Blue Conversation Link button below, watch the interview, and email me with any of your thoughts. Also, I had the privilege of meeting IL State Senator Dan McConchie recently. He is a tremendous man of faith that is humble, hardworking, diligent, and focused on serving others. (See photo below). God bless you. #BeBold -Jerry Evans Please check out my to learn more about me and for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey. | "Conversation Link" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 - Jerry Evans for Illinois, All rights reserved. name: Bill Olson
subject: I stand with Sandmann!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

The President has been telling us for years and years about the disgusting injustice of the media. They exist to tear the American people down, to promote their far-Left agenda.

I truly believe many of them are evil people.

But none of their antics are worse than what they did to Nick Sandmann, the Covington Catholic student (a high school kid).

The media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They incited violence; death threats to him and his family forced the family to go into hiding and the school to close temporarily.

In a word, these grown adults were trying to destroy this kid- to cancel him. This is what the far-Left media does.

They lie, they destroy, they incite, and they do everything they ever can to avoid telling the truth.

But they had never yet met the indomitable Nick Sandmann!

Like a pro, Nick and his lawyers savaged CNN, the Washington Post, and two dozen other Fake News media outlets. While the exact amounts due to Sandmann are unknown, it is telling that Wikipedia now refers to Nick as the "owner of CNN"!

I was in tears when I saw Sandmann speak at the Republican National Convention this week.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

Nick Sandmann, an 18-year-old graduate from Covington Catholic High School who was at the center of a nationwide viral video controversy, lambasted "cancel culture" in his speech to the Republican National Convention, calling on the country to join President Trump in calling the media out.

"I wouldn’t be canceled. I fought back hard to expose the media for what they did to me and won a personal victory. While much more must be done, I look forward to the day that the media returns to providing balanced, responsible and accountable news coverage," he said. "I know President Trump hopes for that too."

He continued: "In November, I believe this country must unite around a president who calls the media out and refuses to allow them to create a narrative instead of reporting the facts. I believe we must join with a president who will challenge the media to return to objective journalism."

Nick is now a freshman in college. And while he will be CNN's highest paid employee for many years, it took guts to come and speak out about our unethical attack dog media.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of every single American who loves freedom and loves our country!

Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is!

A new poll released on Tuesday shows Americans have a growing distrust of the media, with an overwhelming majority saying the press have a political bias and nearly half saying news outlets display a "great deal" of bias.

The poll noted an increase in the percentage of Americans who see too much bias in ostensibly objective reporting as a "major problem." According to the poll, 73 percent of Americans share that belief, up from 65 percent in 2017.

Meanwhile, a stunning 84 percent of Americans agree that "the media is to blame for political division in this country," though the same percentage also believe the media "can serve as a healing force."

Nearly nine out of ten Americans agree with Nick Sandmann about the faults of the media. But they only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

I'm an unapologetic patriot, unlike Joe Biden. Darren Soto sure as heck is not- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time! He's a puppet of the extreme Left.

This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". Knowing the history that led up to World War II, this should send chills down the spines of all Americans.

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have crazy Pelosi's money, which is why I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hiD4KmkkEF6OuRU&b=EbIKTk8.QjaBjp.GXewM.w
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Kat for Congress
subject: Catch up with Kat!
body:
You don't want to miss this.
---
| | | |
| | | [DONATE HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ouquU_iP3rg6yIJN-dE7bhXs--JiyWFApFdXo7Ed7aBEDxB6McwdXePOkCQrFejUk_MNjcoXOy4aQLujZpTtFi4h_ELl4gy8zTJC1dV8TqI6CoUq2F_JeDxdCuh-Ifkkims2xBw9nMX_KdZXE_ac_nigwc_BzS2LokjWPjXOAhc=&c=fTPgIHWpMdkJ3ovksAsEFmC2Mdm-pQlwNctosLbygsEZBXOK3DUGkA==&ch=TD79_hG2uLus2SkO-kOxjXWfMDby-7AgtPVJeRjFQc-l7J9hAPrXzQ==)

| | | [VOLUNTEER](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ouquU_iP3rg6yIJN-dE7bhXs--JiyWFApFdXo7Ed7aBEDxB6McwdXVn-CTPUOfEgNWDXpnFp0cV09Ufc095VbUSbqK0l76w-BOLODfari8ceiqJTZC6vMAkoKpwlUEgy7cVvvjNpG-A7LA0k7d0T3ij-LdMmgsLBjpPkuDBf76A=&c=fTPgIHWpMdkJ3ovksAsEFmC2Mdm-pQlwNctosLbygsEZBXOK3DUGkA==&ch=TD79_hG2uLus2SkO-kOxjXWfMDby-7AgtPVJeRjFQc-l7J9hAPrXzQ==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Trail Update
---
| Friends, It has been an incredible week for me and my team. Last Tuesday, the voters of FL-03 elected me as the Republican Nominee for our district. Words cannot express my gratitude for everyone who has helped us get to this moment. Every volunteer, every donor, and every supporter made a difference. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. I am grateful for and humbled by the outpouring of support we have received. I will work tirelessly to ensure a victory in November and to make sure YOUR voice is represented in DC.
---
| |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ouquU_iP3rg6yIJN-dE7bhXs--JiyWFApFdXo7Ed7aBEDxB6McwdXZeJBBxwWBXk4C9fSKAwEnZlIM2uXBeYARFoL50HGcRsNLWnuEUkcjFeEakzGlQK6z412483UXrao-9Vh2G47SblD0wLaIPDg2dtZ7NEuW358fmZd_bOaZ_riSd2CDpDdnwT8isHb5BBskafCHSUm_25g12mgArrnTnhAEcmJKxm&c=fTPgIHWpMdkJ3ovksAsEFmC2Mdm-pQlwNctosLbygsEZBXOK3DUGkA==&ch=TD79_hG2uLus2SkO-kOxjXWfMDby-7AgtPVJeRjFQc-l7J9hAPrXzQ==)
---

name: =?utf-8?q?Alexandria_Villase=C3=B1or?=
subject: We can't do this alone.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I've dedicated my life to the climate movement.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2461%2E53494%2ExdwNsZ) Friend, You may recognize my name as one of the climate activists that spoke at last week's Democratic National Convention or as one of the leaders of the #FridaysForFuture strikes. But the truth is my journey to where I am today began when I was 13 and visiting Davis, California when the devastating Camp Fire broke out. Even though the closest flames were 100 miles away, smoke was seeping into the house where I was staying. I have asthma, and it felt like needles were pinching my lungs when I tried to breathe. My family put me on a flight back to New York that night. By the time it was all over, 86 people in California died and 30,000 more lost their homes in the fire. It was the deadliest in the state's history. Scientists say bigger and bigger wildfires like this will happen more and more often if we don't act boldly to stop the climate crisis. Even as you read this, California is once again engulfed in smoke and flames, as more than 1.2 million acres have now burned. It's been just two years since I experienced Camp Fire's destruction firsthand, and already the LNU Lightning Complex and SCU Lightning Complex are now the second and third largest fires in California state history. After what I saw, I started reading and making the connections between climate change, droughts, and wildfires. I reached out to Greta Thunberg on Twitter and learned more about her #FridaysForFuture strikes. Soon, I sat outside the United Nations building in Manhattan every Friday as a small act of civil disobedience. Missing a few days of school was a small price to pay to draw attention to this crisis. After all, what's the point of studying for a future that's being taken away from you for big polluters' profit? [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/767?t=3&akid=2461%2E53494%2ExdwNsZ) My strike got the attention of Governor Jay Inslee, who, at the time, was running for president to put climate change at the top of America's agenda. He joined me for some of my strikes, and I hit the campaign trail to share my story as he shared more of his plans to defeat the climate crisis. Two years later, I'm proud to continue his mission as a member of Evergreen Action's Advisory Board. And today, I'm asking you to join me: **[Add your name here to join Evergreen Action in demanding an all-out national mobilization to defeat the climate crisis.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/767?t=4&akid=2461%2E53494%2ExdwNsZ)** Every day, my generation is becoming more united in our demand for a complete and equitable transition to a clean-energy economy -- and we're proud to join forces with the adults out there who aren't afraid to tell it like it is. We can't do this alone. It's going to take all of us. So I would love to see you on board and ready to take Evergreen Action, too. **[Together, let's demand an all-out national mobilization to save the climate and build a just and inclusive clean energy economy -- for _all_ of our futures. Sign your name, next to mine, to join today.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/767?t=5&akid=2461%2E53494%2ExdwNsZ)** Thank you, Alexandria Villaseñor
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2461%2E53494%2ExdwNsZ). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: Caroline, Finance Director for Seth Moulton
subject: I'm personally asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, I’m Seth’s Finance Director, and I wanted to check in to ask for your help. We’re less than 7 days away from Seth’s primary on September 1st, and we just set a last-minute goal of raising $10,000. As Finance Director, my job is to make sure we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign and get Seth re-elected. Everything from staff salaries to bumper stickers to yard signs represents a line item in our budget. And if we don’t have support from generous donors like you, we’ll come up short. Without being able to hold in-person fundraisers—something I’d normally spend most of my time on—we’ve really had to cut back on our expenses and rely on fundraising emails like these to make up for the loss of in-person events. [**All that’s to say: I’m personally asking for your help. If you’re able, please donate whatever you can to help us hit our $10,000 goal ahead of the primary next Tuesday. We’re stretching each and every dollar right now, and your contribution will make a huge difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18863231/242159693/2005830277?refcode=20200826_CM_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzUxMTc0NS1lY2U3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0iQeFJ25sQUC48vkZO7JkJjQaWaLE6B1x4YI48cG2kY=) You have stepped up and, in many ways, carried our team through this election. We wouldn’t be able to run the campaign we’re running without your generosity. Thank you for all of your support. Best,
Caroline As Finance Director, my job is to make sure we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign and get Seth re-elected. Everything from staff salaries to bumper stickers to yard signs represents a line item in our budget. And if we don’t have support from generous donors like you, we’ll come up short. Without being able to hold in-person fundraisers—something I’d normally spend most of my time on—we’ve really had to cut back on our expenses and rely on fundraising emails like these to make up for the loss of in-person events. = You have stepped up and, in many ways, carried our team through this election. body:
If the Republican National Convention has shown us anything the past two nights, it's that the GOP has **no vision** for the next four years beyond re-electing Donald Trump.
We're going to do everything in our power to make sure that doesn't happen -- but, if it does, we'll need strong, fierce, and reliable members of Congress to keep him in check.
**[Help send Linda back to Washington in November | Make a Donation >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/74Desb2ayWpGCtcqxCNq8z1HKWCYYOq1_yG47bYMqsk=/sdp74uoU0XP_BwliIoGu17WubYlhWwjcwf2fRb-aE30=?refcode=X_082620_EOM_A)**
For the last four years, Linda has fought against Donald Trump's ignorant policies at every turn. That's because she works _for_ the people of CA-38 and they deserve a Representative who champions legislation that benefits _all_ working Americans, _not_ just the wealthiest 1%.
**[Will you make sure Linda can keep fighting for us in Congress by RUSHING a contribution to her re-election campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/74Desb2ayWpGCtcqxCNq8z1HKWCYYOq1_yG47bYMqsk=/lpVTXbQh46fhX-0_Zd2ck8Covgs_G-yBMpQ80Su6B-U=?refcode=X_082620_EOM_A)**

name: Team Nehls
subject: Nehls News: Weekly Update from the Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Click or Tap to learn more!
**Nehls News
A Weekly Campaign Update
** _**Brazoria County Headquarters Grand Opening!**_

Our campaign’s Brazoria County Office in Pearland will officially open this weekend, weather allowing. The office will have signs and literature, as well as host phone and block walking events soon. The address is 6601 Broadway Street, Pearland, TX, 77581.

**The Grand Opening is from 10 a.m. to noon on Saturday, August 29th. We hope to see you there!** _**Intern Program Launched**_
27 high school, college and post-grad students have signed up to be interns for the Nehls for Congress campaign. The interns will be helping with voter contacts, research and general projects. Please help us in welcoming our interns! Some Nehls for Congress interns gathered for their first training. _**Yard Signs Are In**_
We just received another batch of yard signs. They won’t last long, so come on in! You can pick them up at our Freedom Hall Headquarters, located at **1612 Crabb River Rd, Richmond, TX 77469**. We’re open Monday through Friday 10 AM to 9 PM and Saturday and Sunday 10 AM to 6 PM. We also have yard signs and literature here for other Fort Bend Republican candidates. _**Endorsed by Texas Farm Bureau**_
Sheriff Nehls had a great time touring a local farm in our district with the Texas Farm Bureau. name: Laura Loomer
subject: New Video: Why they Attack!
body:
Yesterday, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) put out a press release calling me a “well-known racist, conspiracy theorist with ties to the Klu Klux Klan.”
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160930-cdcd345f86-eaa88c06a3)
Patriot,

Yesterday, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) put out a press release calling me a “well-known racist, conspiracy theorist with ties to the Klu Klux Klan.”

Not that I’ve ever checked, but I’m pretty sure the KKK doesn’t allow Jewish women into their ranks.

But the truth has never stopped a Democrat.

Regardless, this is the narrative they’re establishing against me, and I have to rush to counter their attacks.

[Watch the ad we just produced and help me get it on the air ASAP!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160930-cdcd345f86-eaa88c06a3)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160930-cdcd345f86-eaa88c06a3)
We’ll be serving this ad to voters in the district, so they know the truth about Pelosi’s Puppet and my opponent Lois Frankel.

After seeing our new ad, they’ll understand why they attack me, and why they’ll do anything to stop me.

[If you can donate $100 today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160931-4e95b57315-eaa88c06a3), we have another ad coming out in the next 24 hours, and I’ll send it to you first!

[It costs us just $10 to reach 400 voters so whatever amount you can give will be put to good use.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160930-cdcd345f86-eaa88c06a3)

[Donate any amount you can today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390162-919590-5160930-cdcd345f86-eaa88c06a3)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Joe Biden
subject: Quick update on our Beat Trump Fund goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We aren't halfway to our goal of 500,000 Beat Trump Fund donations before the RNC ends. |
---

Peter, I'll keep this quick.

We're halfway through Trump's dark and divisive convention week, but we aren't halfway to our goal of 500,000 Beat Trump Fund donations before the RNC ends.

Reaching this goal before Trump takes the podium for the final speech tomorrow night will send a message to everyone, including Donald Trump, about who we are. It's about our values and what we're willing to fight for. It's not about ratings or theatrics.

**So we can 't afford to fall short this week, Peter. Please, can you help us pick up the pace and make sure we hit our RNC goal?**

[Make your first donation of _any amount_ today to help power this campaign, and you'll become one of the 500,000 grassroots donations we're counting on before Trump's convention ends:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B3_BTFhalf_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.26_B3_BTFhalf_X__F1_S1_C1__full") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b00a/1cd0ac28/16f51e37e/357f4e4f/1917318787/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b00a/1cd0ac28/16f51e37e/357f4e4e/1917318787/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b00a/1cd0ac28/16f51e37e/357f4e51/1917318787/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). We need 10,000 responses from Pennsylvania before Trump's convention ends to get an accurate sample size and RUIN Trump's last speech.

But we're sending Ben Ray these final responses tomorrow morning, so we need all confirmations in by midnight.
[**PLEASE CONFIRM: Are you voting for Democrats in this historic election?**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5b/3512826661/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200826_em_pet_b1_khav_30")
[**Yes!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5b/3512826661/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200826_em_pet_b1_khav_30")** **[No](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5b/3512826661/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200826_em_pet_b1_khav_30")****
_*REMINDER: RESPONSES WILL NOT BE COUNTED AFTER 11:59 P.M._
Thank you for acting quickly!

Team BRL

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5c/3512826661/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5d/3512826661/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff52/3512826661/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff5e/3512826661/VEsEBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff58/3512826661/VEsEAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2aa/18e32a7f/4a099748/7b20ff53/3512826661/VEsEAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Supporting our undocumented neighbors
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Just over a month ago, we announced the weR1 Rhode Island philanthropic fund to help Rhode Islanders who aren't eligible for most federal relief programs due to their immigration status.
Helping these families, many of whom have been hit hard by COVID-19, is incredibly important--not only is it the right thing to do, but keeping Rhode Islanders healthy and safe is an essential part of our pandemic response. Because federal aid is not an option, we turned to Rhode Islanders and asked for your support. We set an ambitious goal to raise $3 million to help thousands of families in our state.
Together, we did it. Thanks to you, $400 weR1 cards have gone--and are still going--to Rhode Islanders in need to purchase groceries, gas, and other basic necessities. Thank you.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOAHcEr7nLlrAQRYUAn_HaiUzFzRb-6ZgzCeWIWGowSn74g_gooxmMe4Ex3AAImePHu4r_ZN4vUFaPkZ_NyurvGvfNwa7Mwtpl5Er_yU6WwcPo3JgDvwylfM=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==)
---
| The average gift to the fund was more than $100. That's fantastic! Your generosity is incredible, but it's not surprising. This is the Rhode Island way. In hard times, we show up for one another. I'd also like to give a special thank you to our core partners: RI Foundation, Dorcas International and the many community organizations helping us to get this money out.
If you are in need of assistance, please visit [Dorcas International's website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOETHDwmRmF02QHe9hUZP75CPdfk6lx7i5q9-XWgx6bIcwPBhLpwyA57i4InrQG6mL5DXCEEtnFFSI4PfuoT21lIZVrDBVO77feunauX-Ji2RLE9kiO5P39Q=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==) to apply. And if you're someone who has already donated to this important cause: Thank you. Your dedication to helping our neighbors is part of why I am so proud to be a Rhode Islander.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOES9TXMtgYfPTzKpDgtjwbUgoQ2NCGbYUZfcWbfsGj_FEp0J5kfWhKNsTs9zWuAf1MVLYq-ggQGN_HwoWo9-XznwAg1TKl13EG98OlIEHWBtAg_nqsiJVaH_SRtK0cnfxSV4dahksZZztDE4FXNxAGc=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOES9TXMtgYfPTzKpDgtjwbUgoQ2NCGbYUZfcWbfsGj_FEp0J5kfWhKNsTs9zWuAf1MVLYq-ggQGN_HwoWo9-XznwAg1TKl13EG98OlIEHWBtAg_nqsiJVaH_SRtK0cnfxSV4dahksZZztDE4FXNxAGc=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==).
---
| While I'm proud of the support we've been able to provide so far, there are still many families in need. I hope you'll consider making a donation by texting weR1 to 27126 or using [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOAHcEr7nLlrAQRYUAn_HaiUzFzRb-6ZgzCeWIWGowSn74g_gooxmMe4Ex3AAImePHu4r_ZN4vUFaPkZ_NyurvGvfNwa7Mwtpl5Er_yU6WwcPo3JgDvwylfM=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==).
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnC32n-k3JLPFd5uCB5no1uaoPfqyIFWT44O8TAz4fXmiE6edx3SOETHDwmRmF02G8M1yrFs34UlNoKYOO71DjCCB9uxYHsKsyK-tXSI1F-M_g72a7QLk2wczabYg-fMGV45UneMYBRY3S67lpB7Et_Xs6GJgxgP23TMdoi_a22wlQOcT8bsxJogCATlE03sSLH2xjZXW3fTnqcbVQ1bFxA72EsFqqX8ozbVX6gawaJZVaZ5I9LZhkkGk_vEr3BgR3AS1ABT9AOPRMQ6xPn5jlzB60ShSY2PZXU1cLeO0pFGlkk3VAer_8NJJPgzT7Vg04LNo7755Rw=&c=wDJePUSWGg7cC9GSMPco2enhR0tpjeasyqHrixRLZhuEhz04advpzg==&ch=AcOfa2EgGf4xKsv6TsT-qV9CHj1GffmijbOvA_BuRf78hkwVQvhxwA==).

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Just over a month ago, we announced the weR1 Rhode Island philanthropic fund to help Rhode Islanders who aren't eligible for most federal relief programs due to their immigration status. Helping these families, many of whom have been hit hard by COVID-19, is incredibly important--not only is it the right thing to do, but keeping Rhode Islanders healthy and safe is an essential part of our pandemic response. Because federal aid is not an option, we turned to Rhode Islanders and asked for your support. We set an ambitious goal to raise $3 million to help thousands of families in our state. Together, we did it. Thanks to you, $400 weR1 cards have gone--and are still going--to Rhode Islanders in need to purchase groceries, gas, and other basic necessities. Thank you. | == | The average gift to the fund was more than $100. That's fantastic! Your generosity is incredible, but it's not surprising. This is the Rhode Island way. In hard times, we show up for one another. I'd also like to give a special thank you to our core partners: RI Foundation, Dorcas International and the many community organizations helping us to get this money out. If you are in need of assistance, please visit == to apply. And if you're someone who has already donated to this important cause: Thank you. Your dedication to helping our neighbors is part of why I am so proud to be a Rhode Islander. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | While I'm proud of the support we've been able to provide so far, there are still many families in need. I hope you'll consider making a donation by texting weR1 to 27126 or using ==. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: VIDEO OF THE DAY: President Trump welcomes 5 new American Citizens!
body:
President Trump joined Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf yesterday as five new American Citizens took the Oath... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99881f0c40&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 26, 2020
---
| | |
# VIDEO OF THE DAY: President Trump welcomes 5 new American Citizens!
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21268af228&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** joined Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf yesterday as five new American Citizens took the Oath of Allegiance to the United States during a naturalization ceremony at the White House.

**“Today, America rejoices** as we welcome five absolutely incredible new members into our great American family,” President Trump said.

**“You are now fellow citizens** of the greatest nation on the face of God’s Earth.”

**Hailing from** Bolivia, Lebanon, India, Sudan, and Ghana, these five new Americans have embraced our country’s values and laws. They’ll contribute both as citizens and as participants in the great American economy. The group includes a small business owner, a teacher, a software developer, a veterinarian, and a medical worker.

**President Trump believes** in an immigration system that is pro-American, pro-immigrant, and pro-worker. By restoring the rule of law, fairness, and security at our border, our leaders in Washington can protect the safety and prosperity of all Americans while helping our new citizens assimilate and flourish.

**Last year,** President Trump proposed moving America to a [**merit-based immigration system**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4a4ee4a19&e=3ee4985eea) that would accomplish just that. “Our plan includes a sweeping modernization of our dysfunctional legal immigration process,” President Trump said. “The system will finally be fair, transparent, and promote equality and opportunity for all.”

**Despite inaction from Congress,** America’s immigration system continues to make strides under President Trump. Historic agreements with Mexico and other countries are making the border safer for legal immigrants and protecting citizens all across our country.

**Thanks to** **President Trump** and thousands of brave law enforcement officers who make the system work each day, all Americans—including millions of devoted legal immigrants—have an opportunity to achieve the American Dream for their families.

[**IN PHOTOS: President Trump welcomes five new American Citizens!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=562deb1045&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The White House celebrates Women’s Equality Day**

**One hundred years ago** today, the 19th Amendment to the United States Constitution was certified, securing American women the right to vote.

**In celebration** of that historic achievement, First Lady Melania Trump unveiled her “Building the Movement” Exhibit in front of the White House earlier this week. The display features artwork related to women’s suffrage from children across the United States.

🎬 [**WATCH: First Lady unveils “Building the Movement” Exhibit**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41ed595427&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Recognizing that women** contribute to the strength and security of our Nation, my Administration will always make supporting women and working families a top priority,” President Trump wrote in a Women’s Equality Day Proclamation last night.

**Last December,** the Trump Administration secured 12 weeks of paid family leave for Federal workers, and the President continues to call on Congress to pass a similar paid family leave program nationwide. President Trump also doubled the child tax credit with his 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, and he signed record funding into law for the Child Care and Development Block Grant that supports working mothers and families.

🎬 [**100 years of women’s suffrage in America!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04530c7717&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**Read President Trump’s Proclamation on Women’s Equality Day**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9632690daf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump participates in a naturalization ceremony at the White House** | August 25, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5619d43a60&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=983feca3f4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1ea752dc59)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Tonight! Don't miss VP Mike Pence's speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
How to watch? Hear from fellow Hoosiers Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence tonight

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/watching-the-republican-national-convention-469686?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SVFWxmKXt8&feature=emb_title&fbclid=IwAR2LubrqhB9j83Ua6alQfpw2z0W8X7O1YEHaFGHH7j2atwdkbQl1pXZk6TI&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

Have you been enjoying the 2020 Republican National Convention? We have!

Tonight, you won't want to miss the chance to hear from fellow Hoosiers Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence!

Vice President Mike Pence will be delivering his acceptance speech (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SVFWxmKXt8&feature=emb_title&fbclid=IwAR2LubrqhB9j83Ua6alQfpw2z0W8X7O1YEHaFGHH7j2atwdkbQl1pXZk6TI&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) from Fort McHenry in Baltimore, the site where events during the War of 1812 inspired the writing of the Star Spangled Banner. Second Lady Karen Pence is also scheduled to speak this evening (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SVFWxmKXt8&feature=emb_title&fbclid=IwAR2LubrqhB9j83Ua6alQfpw2z0W8X7O1YEHaFGHH7j2atwdkbQl1pXZk6TI&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , highlighting our nation's many heroes!

--> Watch Night Three of the Republican National Convention Here <-- (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SVFWxmKXt8&feature=emb_title&fbclid=IwAR2LubrqhB9j83Ua6alQfpw2z0W8X7O1YEHaFGHH7j2atwdkbQl1pXZk6TI&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

This is must-see-TV. You have a choice -- watch at home (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SVFWxmKXt8&feature=emb_title&fbclid=IwAR2LubrqhB9j83Ua6alQfpw2z0W8X7O1YEHaFGHH7j2atwdkbQl1pXZk6TI&mc_cid=1c724fd68e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , or join a local Republican watch party near you. Social distancing will be observed, and face coverings will be required at each event.

Check out the locations here:

clean_body: How to watch? Hear from fellow Hoosiers Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence tonight

name: Dr. Cameron Webb
subject: My friend Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db36/53d9897e/5421f9e7/1c8834e7/3758886682/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drwebb?refcode=20200826_f_1_nd__730__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Derek --

I'm writing to you today to talk to you about my friend, Mark Warner. I know that Mark cares about making things better for every Virginian -- it's a value that we share.

Mark has proven that he knows how to listen to his constituents and then roll up his sleeves to make sure the government works better for us. He's dedicated to getting this pandemic under control so we can get our economy back up and running, to making sure folks have access to affordable health care and prescription drugs, and to making sure there's opportunity no matter where you live in the Commonwealth. Mark's focus is ensuring everyone gets the fair shot they need to succeed.

Mark also knows that being an elected official is about holding yourself accountable to your constituents and constantly proving yourself worthy of people's support. He's fighting hard for re-election this year -- and I have his back.

We've got a real shot to make a change in our leadership in Washington -- by taking control of the Senate and turning the 5th district blue for the first time since 2010. But it's going to take some help from folks like you.

**[Can we count on you to be part of that change? If you have the means, please consider splitting a donation between Mark's and my campaigns today.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db36/53d9897e/5421f9e7/1c8834e6/3758886682/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drwebb?refcode=20200826_f_1_nd__730__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Dr. Cameron Webb

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db36/53d9897e/5421f9e7/1c8834e5/3758886682/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drwebb?refcode=20200826_f_1_nd__730__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - our favorite Hoosier musicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Watching the Indy 500 last week got our team thinking about the great Jim Nabors and one of our all-time favorites songs, Back Home Again in Indiana [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnDtC_YJYbEq6fm5KY_9xQx4lX4RJK7xbWj7Fe4ACchWJd-qxAaM8BV9wzlScqfjHQVEKRuXd2DISSr488e8yNNDdaCDBs4tyTq1luR4zTMwTcnkU6xz6eWKo4iF1TaqUsjfiqj8wabgBUbUL8F8yiBNVpWh76KA3rD2Wdt7TqbOf4WLI8E16onZA69bGvzxH34mbCl0KMw_0mIZwJiW8qxG9NVCa0LwqiAMpvK7h4b9fUhP_VL9mClCUSbNxEFCdHs3SV5oZeUosyC2bmFmvcVw__cZToH1Tt3xvgdgBJtlgQzEqd7N8c5yOp71vda6RXo1BEhol3djaxdhzcOCuITW3dB_P_t23FFZrEPe5UrOlirDVYfrkZ2LjKFQpn3EDvuzUlfjgqac6VlbdJ3aB-XFowdJkmD5H3GWHaYxkRJs_8yCAPAFDsjCctt29XINLtUrGyYzrzy-HiML4iqhk7ag%3D) Friend,

Watching the Indy 500 last weekend got our team thinking about one of our all-time favorite songs, Back Home Again in Indiana Again. It’s a Hoosier classic!
That’s why we decided to make this week’s One Indiana all about some of the best musicians our state has produced. We had a team pull a list of some of our favorite Hoosier singers, songwriters, piano players, and more.
Check it out below, and click on their name to see these Hoosiers perform. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnDtC_YJYbEq6fm5KY_9xQx4lX4RJK7xbWj7Fe4ACchWJd-qxAaM8BV9wzlScqfjHQVEKRuXd2DISSr488e8yNNDdaCDBs4tyTq1luR4zTMwTcnkU6xz6eWKo4iF1TaqUsjfiqj8wabgBUbUL8F8yiBNVpWh76KA3rD2Wdt7TqbOf4WLI8E16onZA69bGvzxH34mbCl0KMw_0mIZwJiW8qxG9NVCa0LwqiAMpvK7h4b9fUhP_VL9mClCUSbNxEFCdHmh9N9PJXzu34yTidl8B9eKD3Se_6x3ExqfsDAzkm7HVLE3BwHlh8we0bKsk9nUU4cnCz7Q8hn4rX05L_ywel0Ansa2HeI-keeryE8h3ZunJv24VRokz1gyhanUraOdkNQI9gmyBK9yPg0bXizPVcy-kJtzIIQ7_NfkQ2Czyp_vOcvQO7kMl4wd55gOAo4EzErIDrHwEGVRX62BNDFWxnGU%3D)
* **[Joshua Bell](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYhOcnelT2-SyESIkyFyRqxoBf6jmkYfsfqbcxA5r5jwOvDZPq1uGDSCgseBWVGQ2IyWQshWfJqCmkjGKJuv1xCqw2_EB69UCC3xuLtnlo2QvI4W_FZk66NWafCUEonVdVcyIYbg2Sl-uOB13ybk8EjFOk8r0Hjx8HfF8998PViwPxp63UWwmOBhdguopZZ2mkId8XPh9u9EhR6G7xdbSDUCbBOjbMRFq60-7ciEi-HYvPzs4gtDRyw1Y-uOHMpiaRb7nruYCfL0OyENffykz18ioxq1qoFEPxuDnKZAH3vE3uo0KnqDeo-UAKrb1Qp8phBWcM-GHOAm1VmqYj_6KSkPXO6XH6z_FKWZaRgWt-A0NqaRacUNzST8pC98eAPmoZdqJcLHFNNHemEzMpZwux2RiSSomIAKyul6OMggo8GxBQln4v5zg_tm7sqe_EyiG5o%3D)** \- One of the most celebrated violinists of his generation, Bell is a native of Bloomington and one of the brightest music stars in Hoosier history!
* [**Hoagy Carmichael**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYhTd4LZCm6IPemYzQzl5MJF_oHw2ER22i6qqqB2B7n93I4Dq5fA8QcKMt-Vze-zuErVW1u74oV-XH0d4Ms9KUyJgKdDeqoVrffuHr0rw97-YsBueliiMm8Az5quvw8NuxbVkulIHzujLRbX0-BjmePomNv_RHWyNY-xar073ZTG891VnaUpFQ6c_SsYMcjgmuQImSdPOLoK59efL2eFK8XdQsr95MQOg-xd0x09cdQLMYZfYI4McJUyo9EYcECPeGLYthqemYTA1XXY-5EVdRWenEvAQKthzTHwm5GTwhAye_E6z-eecRiLHmNUgilqHB5ejllxOB-8G7j9M8tLHB2xj6mWVLO-55TvTRKdnC9dCl21bWAHt1Rim04zWvPgV8OtDeOrArXCq4qfcSTA_CSldfA3LXtk6ZKmJ14K6-INb1Av0q52UXfyxwMGOEcqgBk%3D) \- Also from Bloomington, Carmichael is one of the greatest songwriters of the 20th Century. “Stardust” is perhaps his most famous composition and one of the most recorded songs of all time.
* **[The Gaithers](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnBMFHmtiEDX0whb4VYag0EZhxMZ2m_aa6XFrD2fKi8P42La_7XSlVLgg0T2QQSg4wvXd3tEHKLadULCADM1-2Fpqo7-62Z07xCqv4zmQYFzMZDIaTnNlZhiaFoaOWm0qpjfDEUd-zDqsenD_b9wQvXr3-8EJOmaqH8r5QJyUfFkKh6LjglYhhkj48nM55vnFK0y1kBMtiLvRdMKwLu-Z6-4t5CjFxVxFgdfzMAmDraAFwE1jHqirtNACG8Da23uSfL0bvK7Snzxq1vauya2Ndq8NnsGunQ6-R5jdTa1eDULGLzIAOwqDQ6dhhGkCNbWK93bQZagqzPpPzz43DZXRCYpA2WmnxHE1BKA4FXSa8BS2Ew2Bjp5ffPoeIvnSzuIaU9-SnJ3qFQag8iYVGAn6z4SvhMdiK2gTQLAZEm-PKvq9)** \- Two of the biggest names in gospel music, Bill and Gloria call Alexandria, Indiana home.
* **[Kenneth “Babyface” Edmonds](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYgHcSyKn1hKjLu9dMeAt25sM52rfdTI35Bnnt7M5LsykHUz89iCBnD1SA_SzbQNTr0jouPOKEMCdMaR96uVdXtQOxaLvp72_495GDZ7ua33A0yXz34boWK3RhWmjnOHE9K2n8z7ZMP3qEH9usrWArQwx_CZayoKF6lsciZNpLqNnEa0iOCKSnPBlpdH45VMPnCB_q-7bgNlKhVnsaWE05Z9FtLqmzy05Qieg9PKfJfrXoh4bW2HTIx5o7RRd4QIsE_8VBhN8Dn2FiBX-sBqjjlHNeULNld9VHHGtZeKDThMJtAOrNrPc8YsEBQO_KcnYw3jLZSqStrF2OHNBBDzRuyHpl9x62H4NocPZ-CnEU21png8tgUoM2N0Qo8iG3L9_bZblLLdkedaS8FrXsJoignHGZuVVvlNr2NgfmN0uyrWOS06Ik-DrMvaR44ys9fs9LI%3D)** \- This 11-time Grammy winner is from Indianapolis and even has a stretch of I-65 named after him!
* **[The Jackson Family](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYiUQVAmZIwpOEvOJJyNH91dOGiaKJjImUq7M7yfmwTssnsOP_hU5eTdFa7xH_s3O3ZdhfXt3fOXq_5xAmc15RfXX4mWD13W2eCP3ujZzT6ZUnlvzf-heCrQVTdf7nMfe_ZjI-BZKCV30Po80J02Dt1_-hikVZX6XUb9a00neB1xrvsEDzbxdNBWywp_UMbIyRAvZ_N64-oKVU8Iv-S0uifYng-ivnfFYxNEzI0z6dvbbFrXTdvPlTcJqN-zDRq2bVgPAFNPaGPbu69lSjqZEusqdmokWvIeECsk7V9QJyHLwuY6_SP9O0EjNLDuSLNX3mLSWdu6p4t10RGD4ou8UImuKIa2V9LqViZ_jyceq5UHprhCsDUuEs7l27xJLxk3GpYiyC1v8RZ99RgM_QmaDH1CZz7HlaLgXh5HXLAZL00nH_A_lXiAGhF_VH3YouUTq_g%3D)** \- The Jacksons’ mark on pop music can’t be overstated.
* [**John Mellencamp**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYgQOIdk85Hn65ohRqn0gU0u3mK8bXN0WVXxDMYjXsHyQNgPzNSSplppmuWAVcl55qSoo7gehzzsZV--Z9Crsbwo_EAVEfMsr2jQKAF6dGZEAJHXNt0gVMNCrP2WufsLsQjavcUlGEj8nIidMNvBu7CfFO7KTqFeurGTS0rg-4vUcmVzpQCLFhdnIj_5HHs4fdoPthO6iCPryDUlN_iEZrcWCl0DCXIDxV1f9z5tjMMJsfl4B2_Fj03a-bIbLOnQLf3nT7PDFpEC-rDz8ACjYddBfU0yh3sI-BDUIRZSLIMx1NPYL5fsbaDUaQdr7ew_Nl_nP_dRoohQVJSdpRu8SVb2qBt6opvJN8nIhJRpVBTEE3gq_qNm8B400cuKEp72efkGgYdj_pZUPw03kZgsljaQb587JBp8OExx2swnp2b4VRZ72WTybC2LI0IggGUAnTU%3D) \- No one has done more for the soundtrack of Indiana over the last 40 years than this musician who was “born and raised in a small town.”
* **[Bill Monroe](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYiN1H2VVFTeRRDJ1fNpLGr0BymgfK-_F1iW-ae34SVhPhvS5e8yF0RrQZkxhuzu6XDcJ2MUwRH4Hc3tHzIko74L9kg_GjmvsSu1FXeop5mXa_DRz-_oFBpTg6TXJGfrSg97ITxBhHoGxLhNrtcTCTs4wDo-Z-yrNmP5yOnhT2f7Oivzll5abeDdaUM7UkQg7IlFY0G9sqXD3t_xSPgSoN4XHDLB86R2WiA9AbiwKouwKgPZdDcZvlaMQ1aFEB86XjmrR-W1_FHzTYPoLjHSqWYi6flEoz5fuOnv14gSsKq_GE-OGACx3GrQVS_J0pMQvf3ESNwMSJEOHhcYIhLKIYghWFx3IfnS2MBVbRHs7kmBk0t-Hl8efY8i3YYP9wnTZ1YYmFSQXlCoLlrdz9rKRH46DM_IHrXnJNYOFuoyyNlTmxvEOi0z65vuCOs0TitFvFU%3D)** \- Known as the Father of Bluegrass, his legacy continues in Brown County with the oldest continuously running bluegrass music festival.
* **[Wes Montgomery](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYjkdsLAt34y3vjwE9U_JU6neidkJThwFkJDZxsFnl35kau_P9za0e7nuRW_TpKyuRZJ_xbalQnf1X3K5mKROaFQeBqaHa7S_vyVaxRXavIHlxAabXz1kppO-UMOfqEvfozYY4L9l9Yhrdmc4vlUzAkpS0Lnuj3mfLZR5X19ymprt8LyAwl4CCfRrMVTOYay9FxEMEwEmqqwKMg7yhhQseN1acowWFOBO_hTh0m4LBXSRaky-xEYnhcEx-JqNjoOXSW-8rf_ovXKOL45G-ZWtcHYXqDimU6JWEIQKEieZBPnRx-RxDud8gH3fwNeiJFWZN0SPreY7s7Ge27p2MKL14WZGz-YQNw3keqIcDrgw2c7FFQlAxfLu03zstMcNIg9CHn2I1WWhI4D2O-rA1cCUO0d-3Ayhw15JeDpJDsDMEx5Zwmy6l1YUTLt6gE55R7T01s%3D)** \- One of the most influential jazz guitarists in history, he inspired many fellow legends including Jimi Hendrix and Stevie Ray Vaughn.
* **[Cole Porter](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a7c9f99fba9d4fb89e67fb3d07f87acc&_e=5DrFxGzWZdSJZbzQ97ZPnJl7ekCqCckOIXZAEzzytYjMkWxNYbpirg7C29wQDAqk37Ohlet3TfAsTXAOPSB0BnMlV8C30Kr0FMQTZKqf2fzQ16UKheFruMqHWZDJ-UjOB4-LbiTU9CSA-cxv7QAIaBKGFqEaDcg8zgsaYrcQmYXaqR21sQBpJeoeR_G4mPGf_e1uCwoioJsLabd2-g7na0P9IcX3ZLPypa8L6BKXSg9fDwLMf5p5GUIWGl9TmrxItEK-RcZ3RuN-tnRfhuY2C7RuIN4vENZ7XhfEE9CS4prBcE22NWlYo6a9gYG4Xb-g1UAC1IIlVzxKUw9fTXZKgvq0oLRhNYV-4Z6xEJ22ylU5E__s9Po3Kj4OzX4HY2gT40lXgmfXf-hs8H33IyftHGUp6-FJecTO_v_RUBN9vmKG4ikKIsU3PYHzp3cr1I9qMFSn8Df4SNKC1mkoO4akeawShLZ1hSo573xVzXmtl1E%3D)** \- The Peru, Indiana native was a prolific composer and songwriter who contributed many timeless classics to The Great American Songbook like I’ve Got You Under My Skin.

clean_body: Watching the Indy 500 last week got our team thinking about the great Jim Nabors and one of our all-time favorites songs, Back Home Again in Indiana Friend, Watching the Indy 500 last weekend got our team thinking about one of our all-time favorite songs, Back Home Again in Indiana Again. It’s a Hoosier classic! That’s why we decided to make this week’s One Indiana all about some of the best musicians our state has produced. We had a team pull a list of some of our favorite Hoosier singers, songwriters, piano players, and more. Check it out below, and click on their name to see these Hoosiers perform. \- One of the most celebrated violinists of his generation, Bell is a native of Bloomington and one of the brightest music stars in Hoosier history! \- Also from Bloomington, Carmichael is one of the greatest songwriters of the 20th Century. “Stardust” is perhaps his most famous composition and one of the most recorded songs of all time. \- Two of the biggest names in gospel music, Bill and Gloria call Alexandria, Indiana home. \- This 11-time Grammy winner is from Indianapolis and even has a stretch of I-65 named after him! \- The Jacksons’ mark on pop music can’t be overstated. \- No one has done more for the soundtrack of Indiana over the last 40 years than this musician who was “born and raised in a small town.” \- Known as the Father of Bluegrass, his legacy continues in Brown County with the oldest continuously running bluegrass music festival. \- One of the most influential jazz guitarists in history, he inspired many fellow legends including Jimi Hendrix and Stevie Ray Vaughn. \- The Peru, Indiana native was a prolific composer and songwriter who contributed many timeless classics to The Great American Songbook like I’ve Got You Under My Skin. \- Was “Paradise City” inspired by this Guns N’ Roses front man’s hometown of Lafayette? \- Diamond Dave was a Hoosier long before he met the Van Halen brothers. \- Coming off race weekend, we’re thinking of the late, great Jim Nabors. He’s an honorary Hoosier. We included his Back Home Again in Indiana last week, but let’s take another listen! ** \- And while we’re talking about Indianapolis 500 traditions, who can forget Indiana’s own Florence Henderson singing God Bless America? Did we miss your favorite Hoosier musician? Let us know below! Thank you for reading. We’ll talk again soon. Best, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Friend,

_We’re in the final sprint to Election Day and my progressive opponent is on the ropes. _

I’m going to be going all-out and giving 110% every single second of every single day until November 3rd.

**Friend, you can bet the House on that (pun intended). **

We have an amazing opportunity to restore principled, conservative leadership to our district and we need to do everything we can to take advantage of it. There’s no quit in me, and I know there’s no quit in our grassroots movement.

That’s why I’m setting a simple goal for our end of month fundraising campaign in August - **[150 unique donors.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a549f2e05345402298744d3b75ccae77&_e=lvcB83uf8ULpM6wRNojpto6BCBQcNoyJknTGp-ZaKGRPTNZRgiYhiT3m5NJVOIwcE6ohnWOiODDckT968fqmQ-9lv9aSRLsRN1ceteo05owZ2AWPCvCdft8XfcuRihS3KMj3mOih1i-ySBNj8G3xSaYHDGOfINBBJLdUiDHy3fR69OAhrreBQBk3B7GX0zRz6eMc__fj_y71kE6dL-CtjUr5Jl_NqkeqE8UaVEASrB8NjTESN5CYuEsDroMPbM3QkMoz61QyJSe929pAhK9ri3-6LNtEW7J4gW29PW_oLT9-JmE_CV24rEsvbdbVKz5q6ey9_lprVggCghIkE5-rvWJ73a1px1g6GgcT93ocqFUHa-AlxxqgHqqoHB-cnodM_GGjYJT62gtYkxioA22ciuBCWHQjKjrQZdxPEJk7MrFOUpoOmk1E5TiA9v1zX9N0WCjGPfhNT6TeAZG4eSIyCVhGkU7_oBA2sX8Bym9uMJ8%3D)**

Our campaign is about getting as many conservatives as we can to buy-in to our mission - restoring real leadership to our district, winning one of the most competitive House races in the country, and turning a seat red in the process.

I want you to be involved, and to be able to put some skin in the game — no matter who you are, or what walk of life you are from.

That’s why August’s goal is about donors, not dollars.

Friend, can I count on you to come through for me before the end of the month?

| | **BREAKING ALERT:
_Koch network releases NEW digital ad attacking MJ!_** | [HELP US FIGHT BACK](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ffe/7f51f7bc/43970e80/4ef73138/936867328/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.3nd__2004__&amount=10")
---
This is ridiculous, Peter. We've seen Sen. Cornyn put out some misleading ads -- including one that uses footage from ESTONIA, not Texas -- but this new one from the Koch network might take the cake.

Get this: it's all about Senator Cornyn and health care. **Maybe someone should remind him that he has been trying to gut the Affordable Care Act for YEARS!**
[PROTECT THE ACA](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ffe/7f51f7bc/43970e80/4ef73138/936867328/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.3nd__2004__&amount=10")
---
He's voted **20 times** to repeal or defund the ACA -- repeatedly voting to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions, dismantle a safety net for out-of-work Americans, and leave millions of Texans uninsured. He's health care repeal's "top salesman" in the Senate, and let's get one thing clear -- **repealing the Affordable Care Act would leave millions of Americans without health care coverage. This Koch network ad is not just WRONG, it 's LAUGHABLE.**

But it's also dangerous. Because we're in a race with Sen. Cornyn's gang to reach the undecided Texans who will make the difference in this election.

**We need your help to fight back against their lies.[Will you help MJ take on Sen. Cornyn and his special interest backers, from the Koch network to the insurance industry?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ffe/7f51f7bc/43970e80/4ef73138/936867328/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200826.3nd__2004__&amount=10")**
